    68→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    69→@Composable
    70→fun ProfileScreen(
    71→    handle: String,
    72→    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
    73→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
    74→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    75→    onReplyClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    76→    onQuoteClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    77→    viewModel: ProfileViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    78→) {
    79→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    80→    val listState = rememberLazyListState()
    81→    val context = LocalContext.current
    82→
    83→    val shouldLoadMore by remember {
    84→        derivedStateOf {
    85→            val lastVisibleItem = listState.layoutInfo.visibleItemsInfo.lastOrNull()
    86→            lastVisibleItem != null && lastVisibleItem.index >= listState.layoutInfo.totalItemsCount - 3
    87→        }
    88→    }
    89→
    90→    LaunchedEffect(shouldLoadMore) {
    91→        if (shouldLoadMore && uiState.hasNextPage && !uiState.isLoadingMore) {
    92→            viewModel.loadMore()
    93→        }
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    if (uiState.actionError != null) {
    97→        AlertDialog(
    98→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissActionError() },
    99→            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.action_error)) },
   100→            text = { Text(uiState.actionError ?: "") },
   101→            confirmButton = {
   102→                TextButton(onClick = { viewModel.dismissActionError() }) {
   103→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.ok))
   104→                }
   105→            }
   106→        )
   107→    }
   108→
   109→    Scaffold(
   110→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   111→        topBar = {
   112→            CompactTopBar(
   113→                title = uiState.actor?.name ?: handle,
   114→                navigationIcon = {
   115→                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
   116→                        Icon(
   117→                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack,
   118→                            contentDescription = "Back"
   119→                        )
   120→                    }
   121→                },
   122→                actions = {
   123→                    if (uiState.actor != null) {
   124→                        IconButton(onClick = {
   125→                            val profileHandle = uiState.actor!!.handle
   126→                            val normalizedHandle = if (profileHandle.startsWith("@")) profileHandle else "@$profileHandle"
   127→                            val profileUrl = "https://hackers.pub/$normalizedHandle"
   128→                            val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   129→                                action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   130→                                putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, profileUrl)
   131→                                type = "text/plain"
   132→                            }
   133→                            context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   134→                        }) {
   135→                            Icon(
   136→                                imageVector = Icons.Outlined.Share,
   137→                                contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share)
   138→                            )
   139→                        }
   140→                    }
   141→                    if (!uiState.isViewer && uiState.actor != null) {
   142→                        ProfileActionMenu(
   143→                            followsViewer = uiState.followsViewer,
   144→                            viewerBlocks = uiState.viewerBlocks,
   145→                            isPerformingAction = uiState.isPerformingAction,
   146→                            onRemoveFollower = { viewModel.removeFollower() },
   147→                            onBlock = { viewModel.blockActor() },
   148→                            onUnblock = { viewModel.unblockActor() }
   149→                        )
   150→                    }
   151→                }
   152→            )
   153→        }
   154→    ) { paddingValues ->
   155→        Box(
   156→            modifier = Modifier
   157→                .fillMaxSize()
   158→                .padding(paddingValues)
   159→        ) {
   160→            when {
   161→                uiState.isLoading && uiState.actor == null -> {
   162→                    FullScreenLoading()
   163→                }
   164→                uiState.error != null && uiState.actor == null -> {
   165→                    ErrorMessage(
   166→                        message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   167→                        onRetry = { viewModel.loadProfile(handle) }
   168→                    )
   169→                }
   170→                uiState.actor != null -> {
   171→                    PullToRefreshBox(
   172→                        isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
   173→                        onRefresh = { viewModel.refresh() }
   174→                    ) {
   175→                        LazyColumn(state = listState) {
   176→                            item {
   177→                                ProfileHeader(
   178→                                    avatarUrl = uiState.actor!!.avatarUrl,
   179→                                    name = uiState.actor!!.name,
   180→                                    handle = uiState.actor!!.handle,
   181→                                    bio = uiState.bio,
   182→                                    isViewer = uiState.isViewer,
   183→                                    viewerFollows = uiState.viewerFollows,
   184→                                    followsViewer = uiState.followsViewer,
   185→                                    viewerBlocks = uiState.viewerBlocks,
   186→                                    isPerformingAction = uiState.isPerformingAction,
   187→                                    onFollowClick = { viewModel.followActor() },
   188→                                    onUnfollowClick = { viewModel.unfollowActor() },
   189→                                    onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   190→                                )
   191→                                HorizontalDivider()
   192→                            }
   193→
   194→                            items(
   195→                                items = uiState.posts,
   196→                                key = { it.id }
   197→                            ) { post ->
   198→                                PostCard(
   199→                                    post = post,
   200→                                    onClick = { onPostClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   201→                                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   202→                                    onReplyClick = { onReplyClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   203→                                    onShareClick = {
   204→                                        val targetId = post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id
   205→                                        if (post.viewerHasShared) {
   206→                                            viewModel.unsharePost(targetId)
   207→                                        } else {
   208→                                            viewModel.sharePost(targetId)
   209→                                        }
   210→                                    },
   211→                                    onQuoteClick = { onQuoteClick(post.sharedPost?.id ?: post.id) },
   212→                                    onExternalShareClick = {
   213→                                        val displayPost = post.sharedPost ?: post
   214→                                        val shareUrl = displayPost.url ?: displayPost.iri
   215→                                        if (shareUrl != null) {
   216→                                            val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   217→                                                action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   218→                                                putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, shareUrl)
   219→                                                type = "text/plain"
   220→                                            }
   221→                                            context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   222→                                        }
   223→                                    },
   224→                                    onQuotedPostClick = onPostClick
   225→                                )
   226→                                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   227→                            }
   228→
   229→                            if (uiState.isLoadingMore) {
   230→                                item {
   231→                                    LoadingItem()
   232→                                }
   233→                            }
   234→                        }
   235→                    }
   236→                }
   237→            }
   238→        }
   239→    }
   240→}
   241→
   242→@Composable
   243→private fun ProfileActionMenu(
   244→    followsViewer: Boolean,
   245→    viewerBlocks: Boolean,
   246→    isPerformingAction: Boolean,
   247→    onRemoveFollower: () -> Unit,
   248→    onBlock: () -> Unit,
   249→    onUnblock: () -> Unit
   250→) {
   251→    var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   252→
   253→    Box {
   254→        IconButton(onClick = { expanded = true }) {
   255→            Icon(
   256→                imageVector = Icons.Filled.MoreVert,
   257→                contentDescription = "More actions"
   258→            )
   259→        }
   260→
   261→        DropdownMenu(
   262→            expanded = expanded,
   263→            onDismissRequest = { expanded = false }
   264→        ) {
   265→            if (followsViewer) {
   266→                DropdownMenuItem(
   267→                    text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.remove_follower)) },
   268→                    onClick = {
   269→                        expanded = false
   270→                        onRemoveFollower()
   271→                    },
   272→                    enabled = !isPerformingAction
   273→                )
   274→            }
   275→
   276→            DropdownMenuItem(
   277→                text = {
   278→                    Text(
   279→                        text = stringResource(if (viewerBlocks) R.string.unblock else R.string.block),
   280→                        color = if (!viewerBlocks) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
   281→                    )
   282→                },
   283→                onClick = {
   284→                    expanded = false
   285→                    if (viewerBlocks) onUnblock() else onBlock()
   286→                },
   287→                enabled = !isPerformingAction
   288→            )
   289→        }
   290→    }
   291→}
   292→
   293→@Composable
   294→private fun ProfileHeader(
   295→    avatarUrl: String,
   296→    name: String?,
   297→    handle: String,
   298→    bio: String?,
   299→    isViewer: Boolean,
   300→    viewerFollows: Boolean,
   301→    followsViewer: Boolean,
   302→    viewerBlocks: Boolean,
   303→    isPerformingAction: Boolean,
   304→    onFollowClick: () -> Unit,
   305→    onUnfollowClick: () -> Unit,
   306→    onMentionClick: (String) -> Unit = {}
   307→) {
   308→    Column(
   309→        modifier = Modifier
   310→            .fillMaxWidth()
   311→            .padding(16.dp),
   312→        horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally
   313→    ) {
   314→        AsyncImage(
   315→            model = avatarUrl,
   316→            contentDescription = null,
   317→            modifier = Modifier
   318→                .size(96.dp)
   319→                .clip(CircleShape),
   320→            contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   321→        )
   322→
   323→        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   324→
   325→        Text(
   326→            text = name ?: handle,
   327→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
   328→            fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   329→            textAlign = TextAlign.Center
   330→        )
   331→
   332→        Row(
   333→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   334→            horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.Center
   335→        ) {
   336→            Text(
   337→                text = "@$handle",
   338→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   339→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   340→                textAlign = TextAlign.Center
   341→            )
   342→
   343→            if (!isViewer && (followsViewer || viewerBlocks)) {
   344→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   345→                RelationshipTags(
   346→                    followsViewer = followsViewer,
   347→                    viewerBlocks = viewerBlocks
   348→                )
   349→            }
   350→        }
   351→
   352→        if (!isViewer) {
   353→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   354→
   355→            if (viewerFollows) {
   356→                Button(
   357→                    onClick = onUnfollowClick,
   358→                    enabled = !isPerformingAction,
   359→                    colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
   360→                        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   361→                    ),
   362→                    modifier = Modifier.width(200.dp)
   363→                ) {
   364→                    if (isPerformingAction) {
   365→                        CircularProgressIndicator(
   366→                            modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp),
   367→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onError,
   368→                            strokeWidth = 2.dp
   369→                        )
   370→                    } else {
   371→                        Text(stringResource(R.string.unfollow))
   372→                    }
   373→                }
   374→            } else {
   375→                Button(
   376→                    onClick = onFollowClick,
   377→                    enabled = !isPerformingAction,
   378→                    modifier = Modifier.width(200.dp)
   379→                ) {
   380→                    if (isPerformingAction) {
   381→                        CircularProgressIndicator(
   382→                            modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp),
   383→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary,
   384→                            strokeWidth = 2.dp
   385→                        )
   386→                    } else {
   387→                        Text(stringResource(R.string.follow))
   388→                    }
   389→                }
   390→            }
   391→        }
   392→
   393→        if (!bio.isNullOrBlank()) {
   394→            Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   395→            HtmlContent(
   396→                html = bio,
   397→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   398→                onMentionClick = onMentionClick
   399→            )
   400→        }
   401→    }
   402→}
   403→
   404→@Composable
   405→private fun RelationshipTags(
   406→    followsViewer: Boolean,
   407→    viewerBlocks: Boolean
   408→) {
   409→    Row(horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)) {
   410→        if (followsViewer) {
   411→            Text(
   412→                text = stringResource(R.string.follows_you),
   413→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   414→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   415→                modifier = Modifier
   416→                    .background(
   417→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.15f),
   418→                        RoundedCornerShape(50)
   419→                    )
   420→                    .padding(horizontal = 8.dp, vertical = 4.dp)
   421→            )
   422→        }
   423→
   424→        if (viewerBlocks) {
   425→            Text(
   426→                text = stringResource(R.string.blocked),
   427→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   428→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error,
   429→                modifier = Modifier
   430→                    .background(
   431→                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error.copy(alpha = 0.15f),
   432→                        RoundedCornerShape(50)
   433→                    )
   434→                    .padding(horizontal = 8.dp, vertical = 4.dp)
   435→            )
   436→        }
   437→    }
   438→}

   349→
   350→@Composable
   351→private fun TimelineMaxLengthSetting(
   352→    currentValue: Int,
   353→    onValueChange: (Int) -> Unit
   354→) {
   355→    var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   356→    val options = listOf(300, 500, 700, 1000, 0)
   357→
   358→    ListItem(
   359→        headlineContent = { Text(stringResource(R.string.settings_timeline_max_length)) },
   360→        trailingContent = {
   361→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   362→                Text(
   363→                    text = if (currentValue == 0) stringResource(R.string.settings_timeline_unlimited) else currentValue.toString(),
   364→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   365→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   366→                    modifier = Modifier.clickable { expanded = true }
   367→                )
   368→
   369→                DropdownMenu(
   370→                    expanded = expanded,
   371→                    onDismissRequest = { expanded = false }
   372→                ) {
   373→                    options.forEach { value ->
   374→                        DropdownMenuItem(
   375→                            text = {
   376→                                Text(
   377→                                    if (value == 0) stringResource(R.string.settings_timeline_unlimited) else value.toString()
   378→                                )
   379→                            },
   380→                            onClick = {
   381→                                onValueChange(value)
   382→                                expanded = false
   383→                            }
   384→                        )
   385→                    }
   386→                }
   387→            }
   388→        }
   389→    )
   390→}

    67→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    68→@Composable
    69→fun NotificationsScreen(
    70→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
    71→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
    72→    onComposeClick: () -> Unit = {},
    73→    viewModel: NotificationsViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    74→) {
    75→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    76→    val listState = rememberLazyListState()
    77→    val lifecycleOwner = LocalLifecycleOwner.current
    78→
    79→    DisposableEffect(lifecycleOwner) {
    80→        val observer = LifecycleEventObserver { _, event ->
    81→            if (event == Lifecycle.Event.ON_RESUME) {
    82→                viewModel.refreshIfStale()
    83→            }
    84→        }
    85→        lifecycleOwner.lifecycle.addObserver(observer)
    86→        onDispose { lifecycleOwner.lifecycle.removeObserver(observer) }
    87→    }
    88→
    89→    val shouldLoadMore by remember {
    90→        derivedStateOf {
    91→            val lastVisibleItem = listState.layoutInfo.visibleItemsInfo.lastOrNull()
    92→            lastVisibleItem != null && lastVisibleItem.index >= listState.layoutInfo.totalItemsCount - 3
    93→        }
    94→    }
    95→
    96→    LaunchedEffect(shouldLoadMore) {
    97→        if (shouldLoadMore && uiState.hasNextPage && !uiState.isLoadingMore) {
    98→            viewModel.loadMore()
    99→        }
   100→    }
   101→
   102→    Scaffold(
   103→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   104→        topBar = {
   105→            CompactTopBar(title = stringResource(R.string.nav_notifications))
   106→        },
   107→        floatingActionButton = {
   108→            FloatingActionButton(onClick = onComposeClick) {
   109→                Icon(
   110→                    imageVector = Icons.Default.Add,
   111→                    contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.compose)
   112→                )
   113→            }
   114→        }
   115→    ) { paddingValues ->
   116→        Box(
   117→            modifier = Modifier
   118→                .fillMaxSize()
   119→                .padding(paddingValues)
   120→        ) {
   121→            when {
   122→                uiState.isLoading && uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   123→                    FullScreenLoading()
   124→                }
   125→                uiState.error != null && uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   126→                    ErrorMessage(
   127→                        message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   128→                        onRetry = { viewModel.refresh() }
   129→                    )
   130→                }
   131→                uiState.notifications.isEmpty() -> {
   132→                    ErrorMessage(
   133→                        message = stringResource(R.string.no_notifications),
   134→                        icon = Icons.Outlined.NotificationsOff
   135→                    )
   136→                }
   137→                else -> {
   138→                    PullToRefreshBox(
   139→                        isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
   140→                        onRefresh = { viewModel.refresh() }
   141→                    ) {
   142→                        LazyColumn(state = listState) {
   143→                            items(
   144→                                items = uiState.notifications,
   145→                                key = { it.id }
   146→                            ) { notification ->
   147→                                NotificationItem(
   148→                                    notification = notification,
   149→                                    onPostClick = onPostClick,
   150→                                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   151→                                )
   152→                                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   153→                            }
   154→
   155→                            if (uiState.isLoadingMore) {
   156→                                item {
   157→                                    LoadingItem()
   158→                                }
   159→                            }
   160→                        }
   161→                    }
   162→                }
   163→            }
   164→        }
   165→    }
   166→}
   167→
   168→@Composable
   169→private fun NotificationItem(
   170→    notification: Notification,
   171→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
   172→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit
   173→) {
   174→    val (icon, iconColor, actionText) = when (notification) {
   175→        is Notification.Follow -> Triple(
   176→            Icons.Default.PersonAdd,
   177→            Color(0xFF4CAF50),
   178→            stringResource(R.string.notification_follow)
   179→        )
   180→        is Notification.Mention -> Triple(
   181→            Icons.Outlined.AlternateEmail,
   182→            Color(0xFF2196F3),
   183→            stringResource(R.string.notification_mention)
   184→        )
   185→        is Notification.Reply -> Triple(
   186→            Icons.Default.Reply,
   187→            Color(0xFF9C27B0),
   188→            stringResource(R.string.notification_reply)
   189→        )
   190→        is Notification.Quote -> Triple(
   191→            Icons.Default.FormatQuote,
   192→            Color(0xFFFF9800),
   193→            stringResource(R.string.notification_quote)
   194→        )
   195→        is Notification.Share -> Triple(
   196→            Icons.Default.Repeat,
   197→            Color(0xFF00BCD4),
   198→            stringResource(R.string.notification_share)
   199→        )
   200→        is Notification.React -> Triple(
   201→            Icons.Default.Favorite,
   202→            Color(0xFFE91E63),
   203→            notification.emoji?.let { "$it" } ?: stringResource(R.string.notification_react)
   204→        )
   205→    }
   206→
   207→    val post = when (notification) {
   208→        is Notification.Mention -> notification.post
   209→        is Notification.Reply -> notification.post
   210→        is Notification.Quote -> notification.post
   211→        is Notification.Share -> notification.post
   212→        is Notification.React -> notification.post
   213→        else -> null
   214→    }
   215→
   216→    val actor = notification.actors.firstOrNull()
   217→
   218→    val customEmoji = (notification as? Notification.React)?.customEmoji
   219→    val emojiChar = (notification as? Notification.React)?.emoji
   220→
   221→    Row(
   222→        modifier = Modifier
   223→            .fillMaxWidth()
   224→            .clickable {
   225→                when {
   226→                    post != null -> onPostClick(post.id)
   227→                    actor != null -> onProfileClick(actor.handle)
   228→                }
   229→            }
   230→            .padding(12.dp),
   231→        verticalAlignment = Alignment.Top
   232→    ) {
   233→        if (customEmoji != null) {
   234→            AsyncImage(
   235→                model = customEmoji.imageUrl,
   236→                contentDescription = customEmoji.name,
   237→                modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp)
   238→            )
   239→        } else if (emojiChar != null) {
   240→            Text(
   241→                text = emojiChar,
   242→                modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp),
   243→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium
   244→            )
   245→        } else {
   246→            Icon(
   247→                imageVector = icon,
   248→                contentDescription = null,
   249→                tint = iconColor,
   250→                modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp)
   251→            )
   252→        }
   253→
   254→        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   255→
   256→        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   257→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   258→                if (actor != null) {
   259→                    AsyncImage(
   260→                        model = actor.avatarUrl,
   261→                        contentDescription = null,
   262→                        modifier = Modifier
   263→                            .size(32.dp)
   264→                            .clip(CircleShape)
   265→                            .clickable { onProfileClick(actor.handle) },
   266→                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   267→                    )
   268→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   269→                }
   270→
   271→                Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   272→                    Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   273→                        val actorDisplayName = actor?.name ?: actor?.handle ?: "Someone"
   274→                        val allActors = notification.actors
   275→                        val actorLabel = when {
   276→                            allActors.size == 2 -> "$actorDisplayName and ${allActors[1].name ?: allActors[1].handle}"
   277→                            allActors.size > 2 -> "$actorDisplayName and ${allActors.size - 1} others"
   278→                            else -> actorDisplayName
   279→                        }
   280→                        Text(
   281→                            text = actorLabel,
   282→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   283→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   284→                            maxLines = 1,
   285→                            overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
   286→                            modifier = Modifier.weight(1f, fill = false)
   287→                        )
   288→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   289→                        Text(
   290→                            text = actionText,
   291→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   292→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   293→                        )
   294→                    }
   295→                    Text(
   296→                        text = formatRelativeTime(notification.created),
   297→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   298→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   299→                    )
   300→                }
   301→            }
   302→
   303→            val shouldHavePost = notification is Notification.Mention ||
   304→                notification is Notification.Reply ||
   305→                notification is Notification.Quote ||
   306→                notification is Notification.Share ||
   307→                notification is Notification.React
   308→
   309→            if (post != null) {
   310→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.size(8.dp))
   311→                HtmlContent(
   312→                    html = post.content,
   313→                    maxLines = 3,
   314→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   315→                    onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   316→                )
   317→            } else if (shouldHavePost) {
   318→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.size(8.dp))
   319→                Text(
   320→                    text = stringResource(R.string.notification_post_unavailable),
   321→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   322→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.6f),
   323→                    fontStyle = androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontStyle.Italic
   324→                )
   325→            }
   326→        }
   327→    }
   328→}
   329→
   330→private fun formatRelativeTime(instant: Instant): String {
   331→    val now = Instant.now()
   332→    val duration = Duration.between(instant, now)
   333→
   334→    return when {
   335→        duration.toMinutes() < 1 -> "now"
   336→        duration.toMinutes() < 60 -> "${duration.toMinutes()}m"
   337→        duration.toHours() < 24 -> "${duration.toHours()}h"
   338→        duration.toDays() < 7 -> "${duration.toDays()}d"
   339→        else -> "${duration.toDays() / 7}w"
   340→    }
   341→}
   342→

    43→@Composable
    44→fun SignInScreen(
    45→    deepLinkToken: String? = null,
    46→    deepLinkCode: String? = null,
    47→    onSignInSuccess: () -> Unit,
    48→    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
    49→    viewModel: SignInViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    50→) {
    51→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    52→    val snackbarHostState = remember { SnackbarHostState() }
    53→    val keyboardController = LocalSoftwareKeyboardController.current
    54→
    55→    LaunchedEffect(deepLinkToken, deepLinkCode) {
    56→        if (deepLinkToken != null && deepLinkCode != null) {
    57→            viewModel.verifyWithDeepLink(deepLinkToken, deepLinkCode)
    58→        }
    59→    }
    60→
    61→    LaunchedEffect(uiState.isSignedIn) {
    62→        if (uiState.isSignedIn) {
    63→            onSignInSuccess()
    64→        }
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    LaunchedEffect(uiState.error) {
    68→        uiState.error?.let {
    69→            snackbarHostState.showSnackbar(it)
    70→            viewModel.clearError()
    71→        }
    72→    }
    73→
    74→    Scaffold(
    75→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
    76→        topBar = {
    77→            CompactTopBar(
    78→                title = stringResource(R.string.sign_in),
    79→                navigationIcon = {
    80→                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
    81→                        Icon(
    82→                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack,
    83→                            contentDescription = "Back"
    84→                        )
    85→                    }
    86→                }
    87→            )
    88→        },
    89→        snackbarHost = { SnackbarHost(snackbarHostState) }
    90→    ) { paddingValues ->
    91→        Column(
    92→            modifier = Modifier
    93→                .fillMaxSize()
    94→                .padding(paddingValues)
    95→                .padding(horizontal = 32.dp),
    96→            horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
    97→            verticalArrangement = Arrangement.Center
    98→        ) {
    99→            if (uiState.step == SignInStep.USERNAME) {
   100→                UsernameStep(
   101→                    username = uiState.username,
   102→                    onUsernameChange = viewModel::updateUsername,
   103→                    onSubmit = {
   104→                        keyboardController?.hide()
   105→                        viewModel.sendVerificationCode()
   106→                    },
   107→                    isLoading = uiState.isLoading
   108→                )
   109→            } else {
   110→                VerificationStep(
   111→                    code = uiState.code,
   112→                    onCodeChange = viewModel::updateCode,
   113→                    onSubmit = {
   114→                        keyboardController?.hide()
   115→                        viewModel.verifyCode()
   116→                    },
   117→                    onBack = viewModel::goBackToUsername,
   118→                    isLoading = uiState.isLoading
   119→                )
   120→            }
   121→        }
   122→    }
   123→}
   124→
   125→@Composable
   126→private fun UsernameStep(
   127→    username: String,
   128→    onUsernameChange: (String) -> Unit,
   129→    onSubmit: () -> Unit,
   130→    isLoading: Boolean
   131→) {
   132→    Text(
   133→        text = stringResource(R.string.sign_in_description),
   134→        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   135→        textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
   136→        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   137→    )
   138→
   139→    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(24.dp))
   140→
   141→    OutlinedTextField(
   142→        value = username,
   143→        onValueChange = onUsernameChange,
   144→        label = { Text(stringResource(R.string.username)) },
   145→        singleLine = true,
   146→        keyboardOptions = KeyboardOptions(
   147→            keyboardType = KeyboardType.Text,
   148→            imeAction = ImeAction.Done
   149→        ),
   150→        keyboardActions = KeyboardActions(onDone = { onSubmit() }),
   151→        enabled = !isLoading,
   152→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   153→    )
   154→
   155→    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(24.dp))
   156→
   157→    Button(
   158→        onClick = onSubmit,
   159→        enabled = username.isNotBlank() && !isLoading,
   160→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   161→    ) {
   162→        if (isLoading) {
   163→            CircularProgressIndicator(
   164→                modifier = Modifier.height(20.dp),
   165→                strokeWidth = 2.dp
   166→            )
   167→        } else {
   168→            Text(stringResource(R.string.send_code))
   169→        }
   170→    }
   171→}
   172→
   173→@Composable
   174→private fun VerificationStep(
   175→    code: String,
   176→    onCodeChange: (String) -> Unit,
   177→    onSubmit: () -> Unit,
   178→    onBack: () -> Unit,
   179→    isLoading: Boolean
   180→) {
   181→    Text(
   182→        text = stringResource(R.string.verification_description),
   183→        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   184→        textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
   185→        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   186→    )
   187→
   188→    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(24.dp))
   189→
   190→    OutlinedTextField(
   191→        value = code,
   192→        onValueChange = onCodeChange,
   193→        label = { Text(stringResource(R.string.verification_code)) },
   194→        singleLine = true,
   195→        keyboardOptions = KeyboardOptions(
   196→            keyboardType = KeyboardType.Number,
   197→            imeAction = ImeAction.Done
   198→        ),
   199→        keyboardActions = KeyboardActions(onDone = { onSubmit() }),
   200→        enabled = !isLoading,
   201→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   202→    )
   203→
   204→    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(24.dp))
   205→
   206→    Button(
   207→        onClick = onSubmit,
   208→        enabled = code.isNotBlank() && !isLoading,
   209→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
   210→    ) {
   211→        if (isLoading) {
   212→            CircularProgressIndicator(
   213→                modifier = Modifier.height(20.dp),
   214→                strokeWidth = 2.dp
   215→            )
   216→        } else {
   217→            Text(stringResource(R.string.verify))
   218→        }
   219→    }
   220→
   221→    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   222→
   223→    TextButton(onClick = onBack, enabled = !isLoading) {
   224→        Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
   225→    }
   226→}

    79→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
    80→import pub.hackers.android.ui.components.PostCard
    81→import pub.hackers.android.ui.components.QuotedPostPreview
    82→import pub.hackers.android.ui.components.ReactionPicker
    83→import java.time.ZoneId
    84→import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    85→
    86→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    87→@Composable
    88→fun PostDetailScreen(
    89→    postId: String,
    90→    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
    91→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
    92→    onReplyClick: (String) -> Unit,
    93→    onQuoteClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    94→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
    95→    isLoggedIn: Boolean = true,
    96→    viewModel: PostDetailViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    97→) {
    98→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    99→    val context = LocalContext.current
   100→    val confirmBeforeDelete by viewModel.preferencesManager.confirmBeforeDelete.collectAsState(initial = true)
   101→    val confirmBeforeShare by viewModel.preferencesManager.confirmBeforeShare.collectAsState(initial = false)
   102→    var showDeleteConfirmation by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   103→    var showShareConfirmation by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   104→
   105→    // Navigate back after successful deletion
   106→    LaunchedEffect(uiState.isDeleted) {
   107→        if (uiState.isDeleted) {
   108→            onNavigateBack()
   109→        }
   110→    }
   111→
   112→    // Reaction picker bottom sheet
   113→    if (uiState.showReactionPicker) {
   114→        ModalBottomSheet(
   115→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() },
   116→            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
   117→        ) {
   118→            ReactionPicker(
   119→                reactionGroups = uiState.reactionGroups,
   120→                isSubmitting = uiState.isReacting,
   121→                onEmojiSelect = { viewModel.toggleReaction(it) },
   122→                onClose = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() }
   123→            )
   124→        }
   125→    }
   126→
   127→    // Shares bottom sheet
   128→    if (uiState.showSharesSheet) {
   129→        ModalBottomSheet(
   130→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissSharesSheet() },
   131→            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
   132→        ) {
   133→            SharesSheet(
   134→                actors = uiState.shareActors,
   135→                isLoading = uiState.isLoadingShares,
   136→                onProfileClick = { handle ->
   137→                    viewModel.dismissSharesSheet()
   138→                    onProfileClick(handle)
   139→                },
   140→                onClose = { viewModel.dismissSharesSheet() }
   141→            )
   142→        }
   143→    }
   144→
   145→    // Quotes bottom sheet
   146→    if (uiState.showQuotesSheet) {
   147→        ModalBottomSheet(
   148→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet() },
   149→            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
   150→        ) {
   151→            QuotesSheet(
   152→                posts = uiState.quotePosts,
   153→                isLoading = uiState.isLoadingQuotes,
   154→                onPostClick = { id ->
   155→                    viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet()
   156→                    onPostClick(id)
   157→                },
   158→                onClose = { viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet() }
   159→            )
   160→        }
   161→    }
   162→
   163→    if (showDeleteConfirmation) {
   164→        AlertDialog(
   165→            onDismissRequest = { showDeleteConfirmation = false },
   166→            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.delete_post_confirm_title)) },
   167→            text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.delete_post_confirm)) },
   168→            confirmButton = {
   169→                TextButton(
   170→                    onClick = {
   171→                        showDeleteConfirmation = false
   172→                        viewModel.deletePost()
   173→                    }
   174→                ) {
   175→                    Text(
   176→                        stringResource(R.string.delete_post),
   177→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   178→                    )
   179→                }
   180→            },
   181→            dismissButton = {
   182→                TextButton(onClick = { showDeleteConfirmation = false }) {
   183→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
   184→                }
   185→            }
   186→        )
   187→    }
   188→
   189→    if (showShareConfirmation) {
   190→        val hasShared = uiState.post?.viewerHasShared == true
   191→        AlertDialog(
   192→            onDismissRequest = { showShareConfirmation = false },
   193→            title = {
   194→                Text(stringResource(if (hasShared) R.string.unshare_confirm_title else R.string.share_confirm_title))
   195→            },
   196→            confirmButton = {
   197→                TextButton(
   198→                    onClick = {
   199→                        showShareConfirmation = false
   200→                        if (hasShared) viewModel.unsharePost() else viewModel.sharePost()
   201→                    }
   202→                ) {
   203→                    Text(stringResource(if (hasShared) R.string.unshare_confirm_action else R.string.share_confirm_action))
   204→                }
   205→            },
   206→            dismissButton = {
   207→                TextButton(onClick = { showShareConfirmation = false }) {
   208→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
   209→                }
   210→            }
   211→        )
   212→    }
   213→
   214→    if (uiState.deleteError != null) {
   215→        AlertDialog(
   216→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissDeleteError() },
   217→            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.action_error)) },
   218→            text = { Text(uiState.deleteError ?: "") },
   219→            confirmButton = {
   220→                TextButton(onClick = { viewModel.dismissDeleteError() }) {
   221→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.ok))
   222→                }
   223→            }
   224→        )
   225→    }
   226→
   227→    Scaffold(
   228→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   229→        topBar = {
   230→            CompactTopBar(
   231→                title = if (uiState.post?.typename == "Article") "Article" else "Post",
   232→                navigationIcon = {
   233→                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
   234→                        Icon(
   235→                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack,
   236→                            contentDescription = "Back"
   237→                        )
   238→                    }
   239→                },
   240→                actions = {
   241→                    if (uiState.canDelete) {
   242→                        PostDetailActionMenu(
   243→                            isDeleting = uiState.isDeleting,
   244→                            onDelete = {
   245→                                if (confirmBeforeDelete) {
   246→                                    showDeleteConfirmation = true
   247→                                } else {
   248→                                    viewModel.deletePost()
   249→                                }
   250→                            }
   251→                        )
   252→                    }
   253→                }
   254→            )
   255→        },
   256→        floatingActionButton = {
   257→            if (uiState.post != null && isLoggedIn) {
   258→                FloatingActionButton(
   259→                    onClick = { onReplyClick(postId) }
   260→                ) {
   261→                    Icon(
   262→                        imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   263→                        contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reply)
   264→                    )
   265→                }
   266→            }
   267→        }
   268→    ) { paddingValues ->
   269→        Box(
   270→            modifier = Modifier
   271→                .fillMaxSize()
   272→                .padding(paddingValues)
   273→        ) {
   274→            when {
   275→                uiState.isLoading -> {
   276→                    FullScreenLoading()
   277→                }
   278→                uiState.error != null -> {
   279→                    ErrorMessage(
   280→                        message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   281→                        onRetry = { viewModel.loadPost(postId) }
   282→                    )
   283→                }
   284→                uiState.post != null -> {
   285→                    PullToRefreshBox(
   286→                        isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
   287→                        onRefresh = { viewModel.refresh() }
   288→                    ) {
   289→                        PostDetailContent(
   290→                            post = uiState.post!!,
   291→                            reactionGroups = uiState.reactionGroups,
   292→                            replies = uiState.replies,
   293→                            hasMoreReplies = uiState.hasMoreReplies,
   294→                            isLoadingMoreReplies = uiState.isLoadingMoreReplies,
   295→                            onLoadMoreReplies = { viewModel.loadMoreReplies() },
   296→                            onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   297→                            onPostClick = onPostClick,
   298→                            onReplyClick = { onReplyClick(postId) },
   299→                            onShareClick = {
   300→                                if (confirmBeforeShare) {
   301→                                    showShareConfirmation = true
   302→                                } else {
   303→                                    if (uiState.post!!.viewerHasShared) {
   304→                                        viewModel.unsharePost()
   305→                                    } else {
   306→                                        viewModel.sharePost()
   307→                                    }
   308→                                }
   309→                            },
   310→                            onReactionClick = { emoji -> viewModel.toggleReaction(emoji) },
   311→                            onReactionPickerClick = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() },
   312→                            onQuoteClick = { onQuoteClick(postId) },
   313→                            onSharesClick = { viewModel.showSharesSheet() },
   314→                            onQuotesClick = { viewModel.showQuotesSheet() },
   315→                            onExternalShareClick = {
   316→                                val shareUrl = uiState.post?.url
   317→                                    ?: uiState.post?.iri
   318→                                if (shareUrl != null) {
   319→                                    val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   320→                                        action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   321→                                        putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, shareUrl)
   322→                                        type = "text/plain"
   323→                                    }
   324→                                    context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   325→                                }
   326→                            }
   327→                        )
   328→                    }
   329→                }
   330→            }
   331→        }
   332→    }
   333→}
   334→
   335→@Composable
   336→private fun PostDetailActionMenu(
   337→    isDeleting: Boolean,
   338→    onDelete: () -> Unit
   339→) {
   340→    var expanded by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   341→
   342→    Box {
   343→        IconButton(onClick = { expanded = true }) {
   344→            Icon(
   345→                imageVector = Icons.Filled.MoreVert,
   346→                contentDescription = "More actions"
   347→            )
   348→        }
   349→
   350→        DropdownMenu(
   351→            expanded = expanded,
   352→            onDismissRequest = { expanded = false }
   353→        ) {
   354→            DropdownMenuItem(
   355→                text = {
   356→                    Text(
   357→                        text = stringResource(R.string.delete_post),
   358→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   359→                    )
   360→                },
   361→                leadingIcon = {
   362→                    Icon(
   363→                        imageVector = Icons.Filled.Delete,
   364→                        contentDescription = null,
   365→                        tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   366→                    )
   367→                },
   368→                onClick = {
   369→                    expanded = false
   370→                    onDelete()
   371→                },
   372→                enabled = !isDeleting
   373→            )
   374→        }
   375→    }
   376→}
   377→
   378→@Composable
   379→private fun PostDetailContent(
   380→    post: Post,
   381→    reactionGroups: List<ReactionGroup>,
   382→    replies: List<Post>,
   383→    hasMoreReplies: Boolean = false,
   384→    isLoadingMoreReplies: Boolean = false,
   385→    onLoadMoreReplies: () -> Unit = {},
   386→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
   387→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
   388→    onShareClick: () -> Unit,
   389→    onReplyClick: () -> Unit,
   390→    onReactionClick: (String) -> Unit,
   391→    onReactionPickerClick: () -> Unit,
   392→    onQuoteClick: () -> Unit,
   393→    onSharesClick: () -> Unit,
   394→    onQuotesClick: () -> Unit,
   395→    onExternalShareClick: () -> Unit
   396→) {
   397→    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("MMM d, yyyy 'at' h:mm a")
   398→        .withZone(ZoneId.systemDefault())
   399→
   400→    LazyColumn {
   401→        item {
   402→            Column(
   403→                modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
   404→            ) {
   405→                // Reply target preview
   406→                if (post.replyTarget != null) {
   407→                    ReplyTargetPreview(
   408→                        post = post.replyTarget!!,
   409→                        onClick = { onPostClick(post.replyTarget!!.id) },
   410→                        onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   411→                    )
   412→
   413→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   414→
   415→                    Row(
   416→                        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   417→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   418→                    ) {
   419→                        Icon(
   420→                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   421→                            contentDescription = null,
   422→                            modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp),
   423→                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   424→                        )
   425→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   426→                        Text(
   427→                            text = "${stringResource(R.string.replying_to)} @${post.replyTarget!!.actor.handle}",
   428→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   429→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   430→                        )
   431→                    }
   432→
   433→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(4.dp))
   434→                    HorizontalDivider()
   435→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   436→                }
   437→
   438→                Row(
   439→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   440→                ) {
   441→                    AsyncImage(
   442→                        model = post.actor.avatarUrl,
   443→                        contentDescription = null,
   444→                        modifier = Modifier
   445→                            .size(48.dp)
   446→                            .clip(CircleShape)
   447→                            .clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) },
   448→                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   449→                    )
   450→
   451→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   452→
   453→                    Column(
   454→                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onProfileClick(post.actor.handle) }
   455→                    ) {
   456→                        Text(
   457→                            text = post.actor.name ?: post.actor.handle,
   458→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   459→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   460→                        )
   461→                        Text(
   462→                            text = "@${post.actor.handle}",
   463→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   464→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   465→                        )
   466→                    }
   467→                }
   468→
   469→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   470→
   471→                val isArticle = post.typename == "Article"
   472→
   473→                post.name?.let { title ->
   474→                    Text(
   475→                        text = title,
   476→                        style = if (isArticle) MaterialTheme.typography.headlineLarge else MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
   477→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
   478→                    )
   479→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(if (isArticle) 12.dp else 8.dp))
   480→                    if (isArticle) {
   481→                        HorizontalDivider()
   482→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   483→                    }
   484→                }
   485→
   486→                HtmlContent(
   487→                    html = post.content,
   488→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   489→                    onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   490→                )
   491→
   492→                if (post.media.isNotEmpty()) {
   493→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   494→                    MediaGrid(media = post.media)
   495→                }
   496→
   497→                if (post.quotedPost != null) {
   498→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   499→                    QuotedPostPreview(
   500→                        post = post.quotedPost!!,
   501→                        onClick = { onPostClick(post.quotedPost!!.id) },
   502→                        onProfileClick = onProfileClick
   503→                    )
   504→                }
   505→
   506→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   507→
   508→                Row(
   509→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   510→                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(8.dp)
   511→                ) {
   512→                    Text(
   513→                        text = dateFormatter.format(post.published),
   514→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   515→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   516→                    )
   517→
   518→                    if (post.visibility != pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.PUBLIC) {
   519→                        Text(
   520→                            text = "\u00B7",
   521→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   522→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   523→                        )
   524→                        Icon(
   525→                            imageVector = when (post.visibility) {
   526→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> Icons.Outlined.Lock
   527→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> Icons.Outlined.Group
   528→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.DIRECT -> Icons.Outlined.Lock
   529→                                else -> Icons.Filled.Public
   530→                            },
   531→                            contentDescription = when (post.visibility) {
   532→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.UNLISTED -> "Unlisted"
   533→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.FOLLOWERS -> "Followers only"
   534→                                pub.hackers.android.domain.model.PostVisibility.DIRECT -> "Direct"
   535→                                else -> "Public"
   536→                            },
   537→                            modifier = Modifier.size(14.dp),
   538→                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   539→                        )
   540→                    }
   541→                }
   542→
   543→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(16.dp))
   544→
   545→                Row(
   546→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   547→                    horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.spacedBy(16.dp)
   548→                ) {
   549→                    Text(
   550→                        text = "${post.engagementStats.replies} ${stringResource(R.string.replies)}",
   551→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   552→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   553→                    )
   554→                    Text(
   555→                        text = "${post.engagementStats.shares} ${stringResource(R.string.shares)}",
   556→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   557→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   558→                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onSharesClick() }
   559→                    )
   560→                    Text(
   561→                        text = "${post.engagementStats.reactions} ${stringResource(R.string.reactions)}",
   562→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   563→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   564→                    )
   565→                    Text(
   566→                        text = "${post.engagementStats.quotes} ${stringResource(R.string.quotes)}",
   567→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   568→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   569→                        modifier = Modifier.clickable { onQuotesClick() }
   570→                    )
   571→                }
   572→
   573→                if (reactionGroups.isNotEmpty()) {
   574→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
   575→                    Row {
   576→                        reactionGroups.forEach { group ->
   577→                            Card(
   578→                                onClick = {
   579→                                    group.emoji?.let { onReactionClick(it) }
   580→                                },
   581→                                shape = RoundedCornerShape(16.dp),
   582→                                colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   583→                                    containerColor = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   584→                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary.copy(alpha = 0.2f)
   585→                                    else
   586→                                        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant
   587→                                ),
   588→                                modifier = Modifier.padding(end = 8.dp)
   589→                            ) {
   590→                                Row(
   591→                                    modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 6.dp),
   592→                                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   593→                                ) {
   594→                                    if (group.emoji != null) {
   595→                                        Text(text = group.emoji)
   596→                                    } else if (group.customEmoji != null) {
   597→                                        AsyncImage(
   598→                                            model = group.customEmoji.imageUrl,
   599→                                            contentDescription = group.customEmoji.name,
   600→                                            modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
   601→                                        )
   602→                                    }
   603→                                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(4.dp))
   604→                                    Text(
   605→                                        text = group.count.toString(),
   606→                                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   607→                                        color = if (group.viewerHasReacted)
   608→                                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   609→                                        else
   610→                                            MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurface
   611→                                    )
   612→                                }
   613→                            }
   614→                        }
   615→                    }
   616→                }
   617→
   618→                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   619→
   620→                Row {
   621→                    IconButton(onClick = onReplyClick) {
   622→                        Icon(
   623→                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   624→                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reply),
   625→                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   626→                        )
   627→                    }
   628→                    IconButton(onClick = onShareClick) {
   629→                        Icon(
   630→                            imageVector = Icons.Filled.Repeat,
   631→                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share),
   632→                            tint = if (post.viewerHasShared)
   633→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   634→                            else
   635→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   636→                        )
   637→                    }
   638→                    IconButton(onClick = onReactionPickerClick) {
   639→                        Icon(
   640→                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.AddReaction,
   641→                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reactions),
   642→                            tint = if (reactionGroups.any { it.viewerHasReacted })
   643→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   644→                            else
   645→                                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   646→                        )
   647→                    }
   648→                    IconButton(onClick = onQuoteClick) {
   649→                        Icon(
   650→                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.FormatQuote,
   651→                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.quotes),
   652→                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   653→                        )
   654→                    }
   655→                    IconButton(onClick = onExternalShareClick) {
   656→                        Icon(
   657→                            imageVector = Icons.Outlined.Share,
   658→                            contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.share),
   659→                            tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   660→                        )
   661→                    }
   662→                }
   663→            }
   664→
   665→            HorizontalDivider()
   666→        }
   667→
   668→        if (replies.isNotEmpty()) {
   669→            item {
   670→                Text(
   671→                    text = stringResource(R.string.replies),
   672→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   673→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   674→                    modifier = Modifier.padding(12.dp)
   675→                )
   676→            }
   677→
   678→            items(
   679→                items = replies,
   680→                key = { it.id }
   681→            ) { reply ->
   682→                PostCard(
   683→                    post = reply,
   684→                    onClick = { onPostClick(reply.id) },
   685→                    onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   686→                    onQuotedPostClick = onPostClick
   687→                )
   688→                HorizontalDivider(thickness = 0.5.dp)
   689→            }
   690→
   691→            if (isLoadingMoreReplies) {
   692→                item {
   693→                    LoadingItem()
   694→                }
   695→            } else if (hasMoreReplies) {
   696→                item {
   697→                    TextButton(
   698→                        onClick = onLoadMoreReplies,
   699→                        modifier = Modifier
   700→                            .fillMaxWidth()
   701→                            .padding(12.dp)
   702→                    ) {
   703→                        Text(stringResource(R.string.load_more))
   704→                    }
   705→                }
   706→            }
   707→        }
   708→    }
   709→}
   710→
   711→@Composable
   712→private fun SharesSheet(
   713→    actors: List<pub.hackers.android.domain.model.Actor>,
   714→    isLoading: Boolean,
   715→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
   716→    onClose: () -> Unit
   717→) {
   718→    Column(
   719→        modifier = Modifier
   720→            .fillMaxWidth()
   721→            .padding(16.dp)
   722→    ) {
   723→        Text(
   724→            text = stringResource(R.string.shares),
   725→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   726→            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   727→            modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 16.dp)
   728→        )
   729→
   730→        if (isLoading) {
   731→            Box(
   732→                modifier = Modifier
   733→                    .fillMaxWidth()
   734→                    .height(100.dp),
   735→                contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
   736→            ) {
   737→                CircularProgressIndicator()
   738→            }
   739→        } else if (actors.isEmpty()) {
   740→            Text(
   741→                text = "No shares yet",
   742→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   743→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   744→                modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 24.dp)
   745→            )
   746→        } else {
   747→            actors.forEach { actor ->
   748→                Row(
   749→                    verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically,
   750→                    modifier = Modifier
   751→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   752→                        .clickable { onProfileClick(actor.handle) }
   753→                        .padding(vertical = 8.dp)
   754→                ) {
   755→                    AsyncImage(
   756→                        model = actor.avatarUrl,
   757→                        contentDescription = null,
   758→                        modifier = Modifier
   759→                            .size(40.dp)
   760→                            .clip(CircleShape),
   761→                        contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   762→                    )
   763→                    Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(12.dp))
   764→                    Column {
   765→                        Text(
   766→                            text = actor.name ?: actor.handle,
   767→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   768→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   769→                        )
   770→                        Text(
   771→                            text = "@${actor.handle}",
   772→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   773→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   774→                        )
   775→                    }
   776→                }
   777→            }
   778→        }
   779→    }
   780→}
   781→
   782→@Composable
   783→private fun QuotesSheet(
   784→    posts: List<Post>,
   785→    isLoading: Boolean,
   786→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
   787→    onClose: () -> Unit
   788→) {
   789→    Column(
   790→        modifier = Modifier
   791→            .fillMaxWidth()
   792→            .padding(16.dp)
   793→    ) {
   794→        Text(
   795→            text = stringResource(R.string.quotes),
   796→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   797→            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   798→            modifier = Modifier.padding(bottom = 16.dp)
   799→        )
   800→
   801→        if (isLoading) {
   802→            Box(
   803→                modifier = Modifier
   804→                    .fillMaxWidth()
   805→                    .height(100.dp),
   806→                contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
   807→            ) {

   809→            }
   810→        } else if (posts.isEmpty()) {

   816→            )
   817→        } else {
   818→            posts.forEach { post ->
   819→                Column(
   820→                    modifier = Modifier
   821→                        .fillMaxWidth()
   822→                        .clickable { onPostClick(post.id) }
   823→                        .padding(vertical = 8.dp)
   824→                ) {
   825→                    Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   826→                        AsyncImage(
   827→                            model = post.actor.avatarUrl,
   828→                            contentDescription = null,
   829→                            modifier = Modifier
   830→                                .size(32.dp)
   831→                                .clip(CircleShape),
   832→                            contentScale = ContentScale.Crop
   833→                        )
   834→                        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.width(8.dp))
   835→                        Column {

   838→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   839→                                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   840→                            )
   841→                            Text(
   842→                                text = "@${post.actor.handle}",
   843→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,

   845→                            )
   846→                        }
   847→                    }

   887→
   888→            Column {

   890→                    text = post.actor.name ?: post.actor.handle,
   891→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   892→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   893→                    maxLines = 1
   894→                )
   895→                Text(
   896→                    text = "@${post.actor.handle}",
   897→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   898→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   899→                    maxLines = 1
   900→                )
   901→            }
   902→        }
   903→
   904→        Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(8.dp))
   905→
   906→        HtmlContent(
   907→            html = post.content,
   908→            maxLines = 3,
   909→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   910→            onMentionClick = onProfileClick
   911→        )
   912→
   913→        if (post.media.isNotEmpty()) {

   915→            MediaGrid(media = post.media)
