# Hackers'Pub Android — Full UI Redesign

**Date:** 2026-03-19
**Status:** Approved
**Goal:** Replace the default Material Design 3 styling with a custom, Ivory-inspired design system that gives Hackers'Pub a distinctive, editorial identity across both light and dark themes.

## Design Philosophy

Platform-agnostic custom identity — not Material, not iOS-native, but a unique Hackers'Pub look inspired by Ivory (Tapbots' Mastodon client). Near-monochrome palette with Deep Stone accent. Typography-first: font weight carries emphasis rather than color. Semantic colors (red, green) reserved for interactive state changes, giving them maximum impact against the neutral base.

## Design System

### Color Palette

#### Light Theme
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `background` | `#FFFFFF` | Screen background |
| `surface` | `#F2F2F7` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
| `textPrimary` | `#1C1C1E` | Headlines, names, primary content |
| `textBody` | `#3A3A3C` | Body text, post content |
| `textSecondary` | `#AEAEB2` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tab labels |
| `accent` | `#44403C` | Active tab icons/labels, links (via weight), follow buttons, interactive elements |
| `accentMuted` | `#78716C` | Hashtags, relationship tags background at 10% opacity |
| `divider` | `#F2F2F7` | Hairline separators between posts |
| `buttonOutline` | `#D6D3D1` | Secondary button borders |
| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Heart reactions, error states, notification dots |
| `share` | `#34D399` | Share/repost active state |

#### Dark Theme
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `background` | `#171717` | Screen background |
| `surface` | `#262626` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
| `textPrimary` | `#FAFAFA` | Headlines, names |
| `textBody` | `#D4D4D4` | Body text |
| `textSecondary` | `#737373` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tabs |
| `accent` | `#D6D3D1` | Active tab icons/labels, interactive elements (inverted stone) |
| `accentMuted` | `#A8A29E` | Hashtags, tags |
| `divider` | `#262626` | Hairline separators |
| `buttonOutline` | `#525252` | Secondary button borders |
| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Same as light |
| `share` | `#34D399` | Same as light |

### Typography

System default (Roboto on Android). No custom fonts — emphasis via weight hierarchy only.

| Style | Size | Weight | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|-------|
| `titleLarge` | 22sp | 700 (Bold) | Screen titles (Timeline, Explore, etc.) |
| `titleMedium` | 20sp | 700 (Bold) | Profile name |
| `bodyLargeSemiBold` | 15sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Author names in post cards |
| `bodyLarge` | 15sp | 400 (Regular) | Post content, bio text |
| `bodyMedium` | 14sp | 400 (Regular) | Stats labels, settings items |
| `labelMedium` | 13sp | 400 (Regular) | Handles, timestamps, engagement counts |
| `labelSmall` | 12sp | 500 (Medium) | Hashtags, relationship tags |
| `caption` | 11sp | 500 (Medium) | Tag pills, repost indicators |
| `tabLabel` | 10sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Bottom tab labels |

**Letter spacing:** -0.3sp on `titleLarge` for tighter headline feel. Default elsewhere.

### Spacing

Base unit: 4dp. Consistent throughout.

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `xs` | 4dp | Fine spacing (between name and handle) |
| `sm` | 8dp | Compact spacing (engagement icon gaps) |
| `md` | 12dp | Element spacing (avatar-to-text gap, between post sections) |
| `lg` | 16dp | Standard padding (screen edges, post padding) |
| `xl` | 24dp | Section spacing (stats row gaps) |
| `xxl` | 32dp | Large section spacing (sign-in margins) |

### Shapes

| Element | Radius | Size |
|---------|--------|------|
| Avatar (timeline) | Circle | 42dp |
| Avatar (profile) | Circle | 80dp |
| Avatar (repost indicator) | Circle | 16dp |
| Pill buttons (Follow, etc.) | 20dp | Height ~36dp |
| Icon buttons (compose, etc.) | Circle | 28dp |
| Relationship tags | Full capsule | Auto-width |
| Notification dot | Circle | 8dp |

No card elevation or shadows anywhere. Post separation via hairline dividers only.

### Icons

Outlined stroke icons (Feather/Lucide style), 22dp for tab bar, 16dp for engagement bar. Stroke width 1.5dp.

- Active state: filled icon with accent color
- Inactive state: outlined icon with secondary color
- Engagement active states per action:
  - Reply: `accent` color when active (user has replied)
  - Share/Repost: `share` green (`#34D399`) when active
  - Reaction/Heart: `reaction` red (`#E8453C`) when active, filled
  - Quote: `accent` color when active (user has quoted)
  - External share: no active state, always `textSecondary`

### Bottom Navigation Bar

- Height: 56dp (standard)
- Background: `background` color (white in light, `#171717` in dark)
- Top border: 1dp hairline in `divider` color
- 4 tabs (authenticated): Home, Explore, Alerts, Search
- 4 tabs (unauthenticated): Local, Fediverse, Search, Sign In
- Icon size: 22dp, stroke width 1.5dp
- Label: 10sp/600 (`tabLabel`), 3dp below icon
- Active tab: filled icon + label in `accent` color
- Inactive tab: outlined icon + label in `textSecondary` color
- Notification dot: 8dp red circle (`reaction` color), positioned top-right of Alerts icon with 2dp white border

### Media Grid

- Images: 8dp border-radius on all corners
- Single image: full width, max-height 300dp, `contentScale = Crop`
- Two images: side-by-side, 4dp gap between
- Three+ images: 2x2 grid, 4dp gaps
- Container: no border, no elevation, clips to rounded shape

## Screen Specifications

### Timeline Screen

**Header:**
- Large bold title "Timeline" (22sp/700) top-left
- Right side: compose button (28dp circle, surface background, + icon) and user avatar (28dp circle)
- No border below header — content starts immediately

**Content:**
- Vertical scrolling list (LazyColumn)
- Posts separated by 1dp hairline dividers (`divider` color) with 16dp horizontal margin
- Pull-to-refresh support

**Post Card Layout:**
- 16dp horizontal padding, 12dp vertical padding
- Repost indicator (if shared): 16dp avatar + repost icon + actor name, caption size, secondary color, indented to align with post content (54dp left padding = 42dp avatar + 12dp gap)
- Author row: 42dp circular avatar, 12dp gap, then name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, `textPrimary`) + timestamp (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`) on same baseline
- Body text: 15sp/400, `textBody` color, 4dp below author row
- Hashtags: 11sp/500, `accentMuted` color, 6dp below body
- Engagement bar: 10dp below content, icons (16dp) + counts (13sp), 18dp gaps between items. Muted by default, semantic colors when active (red heart filled, green repost)

**Quoted Post (if present):**
- Indented block below body text
- 1dp border in `divider` color, 8dp border-radius, 8dp padding
- Smaller avatar (32dp), author info, truncated content

**Floating Action Button:** None — compose is in the header

### Post Detail Screen

**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), title "Post" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`)

**Post Content (expanded view):**
- Same author row as timeline post card (avatar, name, handle)
- Full body text rendering (no truncation), `bodyLarge`
- Full timestamp below body: absolute date/time format, `labelMedium`, `textSecondary`
- Visibility indicator: icon + label, `caption`, `textSecondary`

**Article posts:** If post type is Article, show article title in `titleMedium` (20sp/700) above body content, with an "Article" badge (`caption`, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, capsule shape)

**Engagement Stats Row:**
- Horizontal row below post content, 12dp vertical padding
- Counts displayed as: "12 Shares · 23 Reactions · 4 Quotes"
- `bodyMedium`, counts in `textPrimary` (bold), labels in `textSecondary`
- Tappable — opens bottom sheet with actor list

**Action Bar:**
- Below stats, separated by hairline dividers above and below
- Full-width row with evenly spaced action icons: Reply, Share, React, Quote, Delete (owner only), External Share
- Icons: 20dp, `textSecondary` by default, semantic colors when active
- Delete icon: `reaction` red color

**Reaction Groups:**
- Below action bar if reactions exist
- Horizontal scrollable row of emoji pills
- Each pill: emoji + count, `surface` background, 16dp border-radius, 8dp horizontal padding
- Active (user reacted): `accent` at 10% opacity background, `accent` text

**Reaction Picker (bottom sheet):**
- Modal bottom sheet, `background` color
- Grid of available emoji reactions, 7 columns
- Each cell: 40dp, 8dp border-radius
- Active reactions highlighted with `accent` at 15% opacity background
- Close button top-right

**Shares/Quotes List (bottom sheet):**
- Modal bottom sheet with navigation title ("Shares" or "Quotes")
- List of actor rows: 40dp circular avatar, name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`), handle (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`)
- "Load more" button at bottom if paginated
- Empty state: centered "No shares yet" / "No quotes yet"

**Reply Thread:**
- Below the main post, same post card format as timeline
- Replies listed with hairline dividers
- Reply FAB: 56dp circle, `accent` background, white reply icon, bottom-right positioned, 16dp margin from edges

### Profile Screen

**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), no title text

**Profile Section (centered):**
- 80dp circular avatar
- Name: 20sp/700, 12dp below avatar
- Handle: 14sp/400, `textSecondary`, 2dp below name
- Bio: 14sp/400, `textBody`, centered, 10dp below handle, 24dp horizontal margin
- Stats row: 24dp gap between items, centered, 14dp below bio
  - Each stat: count (16sp/700) above label (12sp/secondary)
  - Three items: Posts, Followers, Following
- Action buttons: 16dp below stats, centered
  - Follow: pill button, `accent` background, white text, 28dp horizontal padding
  - Share: pill button, transparent, `buttonOutline` border, share icon only
- Relationship tag: "Follows you" capsule, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, 11sp/500, 10dp below buttons

**Content:** Hairline divider, then post list identical to timeline (without avatars if showing own profile — keep avatars for consistency)

### Notifications Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Notifications" (same as timeline)

**Notification Rows:**
- 42dp actor avatar (circular), 12dp gap
- Action text: actor name (bold) + action description + timestamp
- Notification type indicated by subtle icon or text ("liked your post", "shared your post", "followed you")
- Hairline dividers between items
- Unread indicator: red dot (8dp) on the Alerts tab icon
- Empty state: centered text "No notifications yet"

### Explore Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Explore"

**Segmented Tabs:** Below header, "Local" / "Global" segmented control
- Active tab: `accent` text, underline indicator
- Inactive tab: `textSecondary`

**Content:** Same post list as timeline, scoped to local or global feed

### Search Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Search"

**Search Bar:** Rounded text field below header, `surface` background, 12dp border-radius, search icon left-aligned, 16dp horizontal margin

**Results:** Actor rows (avatar + name + handle) and post cards, depending on result type

### Compose Screen

**Header:** Navigation bar style
- Left: "Cancel" text button (`accent` color)
- Right: "Post" pill button (`accent` background, white text), disabled state at 40% opacity
- Title: "Compose", "Reply", or "Quoting" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, 15sp/600)

**Content:**
- Reply indicator (if replying): "Replying to @handle" in `textSecondary`, 13sp
- Text editor: full-width, 15sp, placeholder "What's on your mind?"
- Markdown support with live preview toggle

**Bottom toolbar:** Visibility selector, language picker — subtle icons in `textSecondary`

### Settings Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Settings"

**Content:** Grouped list sections with section headers (13sp/500, uppercase, `textSecondary`)

Sections:
- **App Info:** Logo (80dp, 16dp corner radius), app name, version
- **Typography:** Font size slider (0.75x–2.0x)
- **Timeline:** Markdown truncation options
- **Engagement:** Confirmation toggles
- **Links:** In-app browser toggle
- **App Icons:** Alternative icon selection

Each row: standard list item, 16dp padding, `textPrimary` label, `textSecondary` value/description. Hairline dividers between rows.

### Sign-In Screen

**Layout:** Centered vertically

- Logo: 120dp, centered
- Title: "Hackers' Pub" (22sp/700), 16dp below logo
- Subtitle: "Sign in to continue" (14sp, `textSecondary`), 4dp below title
- Username field: rounded border (12dp radius), `surface` background, 32dp below subtitle, 32dp horizontal margin
- Verification code field: same style (appears after username submission)
- Primary button: pill shape, `accent` background, white text, full width within margins
- Error text: `error` color, 13sp, below button

## Migration Strategy

This redesign replaces the existing Material Design 3 theming while keeping the same Compose architecture. Changes are purely in the UI layer:

1. **Theme.kt** — Replace M3 color scheme with custom color tokens
2. **Spacing.kt** — Already exists, minor adjustments to values
3. **New: Typography.kt** — Define custom text styles (not M3 Typography)
4. **New: Shapes.kt** — Define shape tokens
5. **New: Icons.kt** — Custom icon set (if switching from Material Icons to Feather/Lucide)
6. **Each screen** — Replace M3 components (TopAppBar, FloatingActionButton, etc.) with custom composables
7. **PostCard** — Restyle engagement bar, remove card elevation, update spacing
8. **CompactTopBar** — Replace with new LargeTitle header composable

No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.

## Out of Scope

- Custom animations/transitions (can be added later)
- Custom font families (using system Roboto)
- Tablet/landscape layouts
- Widget design
- Onboarding flow

lines: - Action text: actor name (bold) + action description + timestamp
-- Notification type indicated by subtle icon or text ("liked your post", "shared your post", "followed you")
+- Notification type indicated by text ("liked your post", "shared your post", "followed you")
+- Notification type icons: all use `textSecondary` color (monochrome, consistent with design philosophy — no per-type color coding)
- Unread indicator: red dot (8dp) on the Alerts tab icon
- Empty state: centered text "No notifications yet"

- Counts displayed as: "12 Shares · 23 Reactions · 4 Quotes"
- `bodyMedium`, counts in `textPrimary` (bold), labels in `textSecondary`
- Tappable — opens bottom sheet with actor list

**Action Bar:**
- Below stats, separated by hairline dividers above and below
- Full-width row with evenly spaced action icons: Reply, Share, React, Quote, Delete (owner only), External Share
- Icons: 20dp, `textSecondary` by default, semantic colors when active
- Delete icon: `reaction` red color

**Reaction Groups:**
- Below action bar if reactions exist
- Horizontal scrollable row of emoji pills
- Each pill: emoji + count, `surface` background, 16dp border-radius, 8dp horizontal padding
- Active (user reacted): `accent` at 10% opacity background, `accent` text

**Reaction Picker (bottom sheet):**
- Modal bottom sheet, `background` color
- Grid of available emoji reactions, 7 columns
- Each cell: 40dp, 8dp border-radius
- Active reactions highlighted with `accent` at 15% opacity background
- Close button top-right

**Shares/Quotes List (bottom sheet):**
- Modal bottom sheet with navigation title ("Shares" or "Quotes")
- List of actor rows: 40dp circular avatar, name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`), handle (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`)
- "Load more" button at bottom if paginated
- Empty state: centered "No shares yet" / "No quotes yet"

**Reply Thread:**
- Below the main post, same post card format as timeline
- Replies listed with hairline dividers
- Reply FAB: 56dp circle, `accent` background, white reply icon, bottom-right positioned, 16dp margin from edges

### Profile Screen

**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), no title text

**Profile Section (centered):**
- 80dp circular avatar
- Name: 20sp/700, 12dp below avatar
- Handle: 14sp/400, `textSecondary`, 2dp below name
- Bio: 14sp/400, `textBody`, centered, 10dp below handle, 24dp horizontal margin
- Stats row: 24dp gap between items, centered, 14dp below bio
  - Each stat: count (16sp/700) above label (12sp/secondary)
  - Three items: Posts, Followers, Following
- Action buttons: 16dp below stats, centered
  - Follow: pill button, `accent` background, white text, 28dp horizontal padding
  - Share: pill button, transparent, `buttonOutline` border, share icon only
- Relationship tag: "Follows you" capsule, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, 11sp/500, 10dp below buttons

**Content:** Hairline divider, then post list identical to timeline (without avatars if showing own profile — keep avatars for consistency)

### Notifications Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Notifications" (same as timeline)

**Notification Rows:**
- 42dp actor avatar (circular), 12dp gap
- Action text: actor name (bold) + action description + timestamp
- Notification type indicated by text ("liked your post", "shared your post", "followed you")
- Notification type icons: all use `textSecondary` color (monochrome, consistent with design philosophy — no per-type color coding)
- Hairline dividers between items
- Unread indicator: red dot (8dp) on the Alerts tab icon
- Empty state: centered text "No notifications yet"

### Explore Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Explore"

**Segmented Tabs:** Below header, "Local" / "Global" segmented control
- Active tab: `accent` text, underline indicator
- Inactive tab: `textSecondary`

**Content:** Same post list as timeline, scoped to local or global feed

### Search Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Search"

**Search Bar:** Rounded text field below header, `surface` background, 12dp border-radius, search icon left-aligned, 16dp horizontal margin

**Results:** Actor rows (avatar + name + handle) and post cards, depending on result type

### Compose Screen

**Header:** Navigation bar style
- Left: "Cancel" text button (`accent` color)
- Right: "Post" pill button (`accent` background, white text), disabled state at 40% opacity
- Title: "Compose", "Reply", or "Quoting" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, 15sp/600)

**Content:**
- Reply indicator (if replying): "Replying to @handle" in `textSecondary`, 13sp
- Text editor: full-width, 15sp, placeholder "What's on your mind?"
- Markdown support with live preview toggle

**Bottom toolbar:** Visibility selector, language picker — subtle icons in `textSecondary`

### Settings Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Settings"

**Content:** Grouped list sections with section headers (13sp/500, uppercase, `textSecondary`)

Sections:
- **App Info:** Logo (80dp, 16dp corner radius), app name, version
- **Typography:** Font size slider (0.75x–2.0x)
- **Timeline:** Markdown truncation options
- **Engagement:** Confirmation toggles
- **Links:** In-app browser toggle
- **App Icons:** Alternative icon selection

Each row: standard list item, 16dp padding, `textPrimary` label, `textSecondary` value/description. Hairline dividers between rows.

### Sign-In Screen

**Layout:** Centered vertically

- Logo: 120dp, centered
- Title: "Hackers' Pub" (22sp/700), 16dp below logo
- Subtitle: "Sign in to continue" (14sp, `textSecondary`), 4dp below title
- Username field: rounded border (12dp radius), `surface` background, 32dp below subtitle, 32dp horizontal margin
- Verification code field: same style (appears after username submission)
- Primary button: pill shape, `accent` background, white text, full width within margins
- Error text: `error` color, 13sp, below button

## Migration Strategy

This redesign replaces the existing Material Design 3 theming while keeping the same Compose architecture. Changes are purely in the UI layer:

1. **Theme.kt** — Replace M3 color scheme with custom color tokens
2. **Spacing.kt** — Already exists, minor adjustments to values
3. **New: Typography.kt** — Define custom text styles (not M3 Typography)
4. **New: Shapes.kt** — Define shape tokens
5. **New: Icons.kt** — Custom icon set (if switching from Material Icons to Feather/Lucide)
6. **Each screen** — Replace M3 components (TopAppBar, FloatingActionButton, etc.) with custom composables
7. **PostCard** — Restyle engagement bar, remove card elevation, update spacing
8. **CompactTopBar** — Replace with new LargeTitle header composable

No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.

## Out of Scope

- Custom animations/transitions (can be added later)
- Custom font families (using system Roboto)
- Tablet/landscape layouts
- Widget design
- Onboarding flow

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# Hackers'Pub Android — Full UI Redesign

**Date:** 2026-03-19
**Status:** Approved
**Goal:** Replace the default Material Design 3 styling with a custom, Ivory-inspired design system that gives Hackers'Pub a distinctive, editorial identity across both light and dark themes.

## Design Philosophy

Platform-agnostic custom identity — not Material, not iOS-native, but a unique Hackers'Pub look inspired by Ivory (Tapbots' Mastodon client). Near-monochrome palette with Deep Stone accent. Typography-first: font weight carries emphasis rather than color. Semantic colors (red, green) reserved for interactive state changes, giving them maximum impact against the neutral base.

## Design System

### Color Palette

#### Light Theme
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `background` | `#FFFFFF` | Screen background |
| `surface` | `#F2F2F7` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
| `textPrimary` | `#1C1C1E` | Headlines, names, primary content |
| `textBody` | `#3A3A3C` | Body text, post content |
| `textSecondary` | `#AEAEB2` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tab labels |
| `accent` | `#44403C` | Active tab icons/labels, links (via weight), follow buttons, interactive elements |
| `accentMuted` | `#78716C` | Hashtags, relationship tags background at 10% opacity |
| `divider` | `#F2F2F7` | Hairline separators between posts |
| `buttonOutline` | `#D6D3D1` | Secondary button borders |
| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Heart reactions, error states, notification dots |
| `share` | `#34D399` | Share/repost active state |

#### Dark Theme
| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `background` | `#171717` | Screen background |
| `surface` | `#262626` | Dividers, secondary surfaces, icon button backgrounds |
| `textPrimary` | `#FAFAFA` | Headlines, names |
| `textBody` | `#D4D4D4` | Body text |
| `textSecondary` | `#737373` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tabs |
| `accent` | `#D6D3D1` | Active tab icons/labels, interactive elements (inverted stone) |
| `accentMuted` | `#A8A29E` | Hashtags, tags |
| `divider` | `#262626` | Hairline separators |
| `buttonOutline` | `#525252` | Secondary button borders |
| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Same as light |
| `share` | `#34D399` | Same as light |

### Typography

System default (Roboto on Android). No custom fonts — emphasis via weight hierarchy only.

| Style | Size | Weight | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|-------|
| `titleLarge` | 22sp | 700 (Bold) | Screen titles (Timeline, Explore, etc.) |
| `titleMedium` | 20sp | 700 (Bold) | Profile name |
| `bodyLargeSemiBold` | 15sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Author names in post cards |
| `bodyLarge` | 15sp | 400 (Regular) | Post content, bio text |
| `bodyMedium` | 14sp | 400 (Regular) | Stats labels, settings items |
| `labelMedium` | 13sp | 400 (Regular) | Handles, timestamps, engagement counts |
| `labelSmall` | 12sp | 500 (Medium) | Hashtags, relationship tags |
| `caption` | 11sp | 500 (Medium) | Tag pills, repost indicators |
| `tabLabel` | 10sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Bottom tab labels |

**Letter spacing:** -0.3sp on `titleLarge` for tighter headline feel. Default elsewhere.

### Spacing

Base unit: 4dp. Consistent throughout.

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `xs` | 4dp | Fine spacing (between name and handle) |
| `sm` | 8dp | Compact spacing (engagement icon gaps) |
| `md` | 12dp | Element spacing (avatar-to-text gap, between post sections) |
| `lg` | 16dp | Standard padding (screen edges, post padding) |
| `xl` | 24dp | Section spacing (stats row gaps) |
| `xxl` | 32dp | Large section spacing (sign-in margins) |

### Shapes

| Element | Radius | Size |
|---------|--------|------|
| Avatar (timeline) | Circle | 42dp |
| Avatar (profile) | Circle | 80dp |
| Avatar (repost indicator) | Circle | 16dp |
| Pill buttons (Follow, etc.) | 20dp | Height ~36dp |
| Icon buttons (compose, etc.) | Circle | 28dp |
| Relationship tags | Full capsule | Auto-width |
| Notification dot | Circle | 8dp |

No card elevation or shadows anywhere. Post separation via hairline dividers only.

### Icons

Outlined stroke icons (Feather/Lucide style), 22dp for tab bar, 16dp for engagement bar. Stroke width 1.5dp.

- Active state: filled icon with accent color
- Inactive state: outlined icon with secondary color
- Engagement active states per action:
  - Reply: `accent` color when active (user has replied)
  - Share/Repost: `share` green (`#34D399`) when active
  - Reaction/Heart: `reaction` red (`#E8453C`) when active, filled
  - Quote: `accent` color when active (user has quoted)
  - External share: no active state, always `textSecondary`

### Bottom Navigation Bar

- Height: 56dp (standard)
- Background: `background` color (white in light, `#171717` in dark)
- Top border: 1dp hairline in `divider` color
- 4 tabs (authenticated): Home, Explore, Alerts, Search
- 4 tabs (unauthenticated): Local, Fediverse, Search, Sign In
- Icon size: 22dp, stroke width 1.5dp
- Label: 10sp/600 (`tabLabel`), 3dp below icon
- Active tab: filled icon + label in `accent` color
- Inactive tab: outlined icon + label in `textSecondary` color
- Notification dot: 8dp red circle (`reaction` color), positioned top-right of Alerts icon with 2dp white border

### Media Grid

- Images: 8dp border-radius on all corners
- Single image: full width, max-height 300dp, `contentScale = Crop`
- Two images: side-by-side, 4dp gap between
- Three+ images: 2x2 grid, 4dp gaps
- Container: no border, no elevation, clips to rounded shape

## Screen Specifications

### Timeline Screen

**Header:**
- Large bold title "Timeline" (22sp/700) top-left
- Right side: compose button (28dp circle, surface background, + icon) and user avatar (28dp circle)
- No border below header — content starts immediately

**Content:**
- Vertical scrolling list (LazyColumn)
- Posts separated by 1dp hairline dividers (`divider` color) with 16dp horizontal margin
- Pull-to-refresh support

**Post Card Layout:**
- 16dp horizontal padding, 12dp vertical padding
- Repost indicator (if shared): 16dp avatar + repost icon + actor name, caption size, secondary color, indented to align with post content (54dp left padding = 42dp avatar + 12dp gap)
- Author row: 42dp circular avatar, 12dp gap, then name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, `textPrimary`) + timestamp (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`) on same baseline
- Body text: 15sp/400, `textBody` color, 4dp below author row
- Hashtags: 11sp/500, `accentMuted` color, 6dp below body
- Engagement bar: 10dp below content, icons (16dp) + counts (13sp), 18dp gaps between items. Muted by default, semantic colors when active (red heart filled, green repost)

**Quoted Post (if present):**
- Indented block below body text
- 1dp border in `divider` color, 8dp border-radius, 8dp padding
- Smaller avatar (32dp), author info, truncated content

**Floating Action Button:** None — compose is in the header

### Post Detail Screen

**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), title "Post" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`)

**Post Content (expanded view):**
- Same author row as timeline post card (avatar, name, handle)
- Full body text rendering (no truncation), `bodyLarge`
- Full timestamp below body: absolute date/time format, `labelMedium`, `textSecondary`
- Visibility indicator: icon + label, `caption`, `textSecondary`

**Article posts:** If post type is Article, show article title in `titleMedium` (20sp/700) above body content, with an "Article" badge (`caption`, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, capsule shape)

**Engagement Stats Row:**
- Horizontal row below post content, 12dp vertical padding
- Counts displayed as: "12 Shares · 23 Reactions · 4 Quotes"
- `bodyMedium`, counts in `textPrimary` (bold), labels in `textSecondary`
- Tappable — opens bottom sheet with actor list

**Action Bar:**
- Below stats, separated by hairline dividers above and below
- Full-width row with evenly spaced action icons: Reply, Share, React, Quote, Delete (owner only), External Share
- Icons: 20dp, `textSecondary` by default, semantic colors when active
- Delete icon: `reaction` red color

**Reaction Groups:**
- Below action bar if reactions exist
- Horizontal scrollable row of emoji pills
- Each pill: emoji + count, `surface` background, 16dp border-radius, 8dp horizontal padding
- Active (user reacted): `accent` at 10% opacity background, `accent` text

**Reaction Picker (bottom sheet):**
- Modal bottom sheet, `background` color
- Grid of available emoji reactions, 7 columns
- Each cell: 40dp, 8dp border-radius
- Active reactions highlighted with `accent` at 15% opacity background
- Close button top-right

**Shares/Quotes List (bottom sheet):**
- Modal bottom sheet with navigation title ("Shares" or "Quotes")
- List of actor rows: 40dp circular avatar, name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`), handle (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`)
- "Load more" button at bottom if paginated
- Empty state: centered "No shares yet" / "No quotes yet"

**Reply Thread:**
- Below the main post, same post card format as timeline
- Replies listed with hairline dividers
- Reply FAB: 56dp circle, `accent` background, white reply icon, bottom-right positioned, 16dp margin from edges

### Profile Screen

**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), no title text

**Profile Section (centered):**
- 80dp circular avatar
- Name: 20sp/700, 12dp below avatar
- Handle: 14sp/400, `textSecondary`, 2dp below name
- Bio: 14sp/400, `textBody`, centered, 10dp below handle, 24dp horizontal margin
- Stats row: 24dp gap between items, centered, 14dp below bio
  - Each stat: count (16sp/700) above label (12sp/secondary)
  - Three items: Posts, Followers, Following
- Action buttons: 16dp below stats, centered
  - Follow: pill button, `accent` background, white text, 28dp horizontal padding
  - Share: pill button, transparent, `buttonOutline` border, share icon only
- Relationship tag: "Follows you" capsule, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, 11sp/500, 10dp below buttons

**Content:** Hairline divider, then post list identical to timeline (without avatars if showing own profile — keep avatars for consistency)

### Notifications Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Notifications" (same as timeline)

**Notification Rows:**
- 42dp actor avatar (circular), 12dp gap
- Action text: actor name (bold) + action description + timestamp
- Notification type indicated by text ("liked your post", "shared your post", "followed you")
- Notification type icons: all use `textSecondary` color (monochrome, consistent with design philosophy — no per-type color coding)
- Hairline dividers between items
- Unread indicator: red dot (8dp) on the Alerts tab icon
- Empty state: centered text "No notifications yet"

### Explore Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Explore"

**Segmented Tabs:** Below header, "Local" / "Global" segmented control
- Active tab: `accent` text, underline indicator
- Inactive tab: `textSecondary`

**Content:** Same post list as timeline, scoped to local or global feed

### Search Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Search"

**Search Bar:** Rounded text field below header, `surface` background, 12dp border-radius, search icon left-aligned, 16dp horizontal margin

**Results:** Actor rows (avatar + name + handle) and post cards, depending on result type

### Compose Screen

**Header:** Navigation bar style
- Left: "Cancel" text button (`accent` color)
- Right: "Post" pill button (`accent` background, white text), disabled state at 40% opacity
- Title: "Compose", "Reply", or "Quoting" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, 15sp/600)

**Content:**
- Reply indicator (if replying): "Replying to @handle" in `textSecondary`, 13sp
- Text editor: full-width, 15sp, placeholder "What's on your mind?"
- Markdown support with live preview toggle

**Bottom toolbar:** Visibility selector, language picker — subtle icons in `textSecondary`

### Settings Screen

**Header:** Large bold title "Settings"

**Content:** Grouped list sections with section headers (13sp/500, uppercase, `textSecondary`)

Sections:
- **App Info:** Logo (80dp, 16dp corner radius), app name, version
- **Typography:** Font size slider (0.75x–2.0x)
- **Timeline:** Markdown truncation options
- **Engagement:** Confirmation toggles
- **Links:** In-app browser toggle
- **About:** Open source licenses, links

Each row: standard list item, 16dp padding, `textPrimary` label, `textSecondary` value/description. Hairline dividers between rows.

### Sign-In Screen

**Layout:** Centered vertically

- Logo: 120dp, centered
- Title: "Hackers' Pub" (22sp/700), 16dp below logo
- Subtitle: "Sign in to continue" (14sp, `textSecondary`), 4dp below title
- Username field: rounded border (12dp radius), `surface` background, 32dp below subtitle, 32dp horizontal margin
- Verification code field: same style (appears after username submission)
- Primary button: pill shape, `accent` background, white text, full width within margins
- Error text: `error` color, 13sp, below button

## Migration Strategy

This redesign replaces the existing Material Design 3 theming while keeping the same Compose architecture. Changes are purely in the UI layer:

1. **Theme.kt** — Replace M3 color scheme with custom color tokens
2. **Spacing.kt** — Already exists, minor adjustments to values
3. **New: Typography.kt** — Define custom text styles (not M3 Typography)
4. **New: Shapes.kt** — Define shape tokens
5. **New: Icons.kt** — Custom icon set (if switching from Material Icons to Feather/Lucide)
6. **Each screen** — Replace M3 components (TopAppBar, FloatingActionButton, etc.) with custom composables
7. **PostCard** — Restyle engagement bar, remove card elevation, update spacing
8. **CompactTopBar** — Replace with new LargeTitle header composable

No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.

## Out of Scope

- Custom animations/transitions (can be added later)
- Custom font families (using system Roboto)
- Tablet/landscape layouts
- Widget design
- Onboarding flow

lines: No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.

+**Note on profile stats:** The current data model (`Actor`) does not include follower/following/post counts. The stats row in the profile screen should only display stats that are available from the API. If counts are not available, omit the stats row entirely rather than showing zeros.

+**Note on font scaling:** The custom typography definitions serve as base values. The existing `LocalFontScale` mechanism continues to apply — all `sp` values are multiplied by the user's font scale preference (0.75x–2.0x).

    36→| `textBody` | `#D4D4D4` | Body text |
    37→| `textSecondary` | `#737373` | Handles, timestamps, inactive tabs |
    38→| `accent` | `#D6D3D1` | Active tab icons/labels, interactive elements (inverted stone) |
    39→| `accentMuted` | `#A8A29E` | Hashtags, tags |
    40→| `divider` | `#262626` | Hairline separators |
    41→| `buttonOutline` | `#525252` | Secondary button borders |
    42→| `error` / `reaction` | `#E8453C` | Same as light |
    43→| `share` | `#34D399` | Same as light |
    44→
    45→### Typography
    46→
    47→System default (Roboto on Android). No custom fonts — emphasis via weight hierarchy only.
    48→
    49→| Style | Size | Weight | Usage |
    50→|-------|------|--------|-------|
    51→| `titleLarge` | 22sp | 700 (Bold) | Screen titles (Timeline, Explore, etc.) |
    52→| `titleMedium` | 20sp | 700 (Bold) | Profile name |
    53→| `bodyLargeSemiBold` | 15sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Author names in post cards |
    54→| `bodyLarge` | 15sp | 400 (Regular) | Post content, bio text |
    55→| `bodyMedium` | 14sp | 400 (Regular) | Stats labels, settings items |
    56→| `labelMedium` | 13sp | 400 (Regular) | Handles, timestamps, engagement counts |
    57→| `labelSmall` | 12sp | 500 (Medium) | Hashtags, relationship tags |
    58→| `caption` | 11sp | 500 (Medium) | Tag pills, repost indicators |
    59→| `tabLabel` | 10sp | 600 (SemiBold) | Bottom tab labels |
    60→
    61→**Letter spacing:** -0.3sp on `titleLarge` for tighter headline feel. Default elsewhere.
    62→
    63→### Spacing
    64→
    65→Base unit: 4dp. Consistent throughout.
    66→
    67→| Token | Value | Usage |
    68→|-------|-------|-------|
    69→| `xs` | 4dp | Fine spacing (between name and handle) |
    70→| `sm` | 8dp | Compact spacing (engagement icon gaps) |
    71→| `md` | 12dp | Element spacing (avatar-to-text gap, between post sections) |
    72→| `lg` | 16dp | Standard padding (screen edges, post padding) |
    73→| `xl` | 24dp | Section spacing (stats row gaps) |
    74→| `xxl` | 32dp | Large section spacing (sign-in margins) |
    75→
    76→### Shapes
    77→
    78→| Element | Radius | Size |
    79→|---------|--------|------|
    80→| Avatar (timeline) | Circle | 42dp |
    81→| Avatar (profile) | Circle | 80dp |
    82→| Avatar (repost indicator) | Circle | 16dp |
    83→| Pill buttons (Follow, etc.) | 20dp | Height ~36dp |
    84→| Icon buttons (compose, etc.) | Circle | 28dp |
    85→| Relationship tags | Full capsule | Auto-width |
    86→| Notification dot | Circle | 8dp |
    87→
    88→No card elevation or shadows anywhere. Post separation via hairline dividers only.
    89→
    90→### Icons
    91→
    92→Outlined stroke icons (Feather/Lucide style), 22dp for tab bar, 16dp for engagement bar. Stroke width 1.5dp.
    93→
    94→- Active state: filled icon with accent color
    95→- Inactive state: outlined icon with secondary color
    96→- Engagement active states per action:
    97→  - Reply: `accent` color when active (user has replied)
    98→  - Share/Repost: `share` green (`#34D399`) when active
    99→  - Reaction/Heart: `reaction` red (`#E8453C`) when active, filled
   100→  - Quote: `accent` color when active (user has quoted)
   101→  - External share: no active state, always `textSecondary`
   102→
   103→### Bottom Navigation Bar
   104→
   105→- Height: 56dp (standard)
   106→- Background: `background` color (white in light, `#171717` in dark)
   107→- Top border: 1dp hairline in `divider` color
   108→- 4 tabs (authenticated): Home, Explore, Alerts, Search
   109→- 4 tabs (unauthenticated): Local, Fediverse, Search, Sign In
   110→- Icon size: 22dp, stroke width 1.5dp
   111→- Label: 10sp/600 (`tabLabel`), 3dp below icon
   112→- Active tab: filled icon + label in `accent` color
   113→- Inactive tab: outlined icon + label in `textSecondary` color
   114→- Notification dot: 8dp red circle (`reaction` color), positioned top-right of Alerts icon with 2dp white border
   115→
   116→### Media Grid
   117→
   118→- Images: 8dp border-radius on all corners
   119→- Single image: full width, max-height 300dp, `contentScale = Crop`
   120→- Two images: side-by-side, 4dp gap between
   121→- Three+ images: 2x2 grid, 4dp gaps
   122→- Container: no border, no elevation, clips to rounded shape
   123→
   124→## Screen Specifications
   125→
   126→### Timeline Screen
   127→
   128→**Header:**
   129→- Large bold title "Timeline" (22sp/700) top-left
   130→- Right side: compose button (28dp circle, surface background, + icon) and user avatar (28dp circle)
   131→- No border below header — content starts immediately
   132→
   133→**Content:**
   134→- Vertical scrolling list (LazyColumn)
   135→- Posts separated by 1dp hairline dividers (`divider` color) with 16dp horizontal margin
   136→- Pull-to-refresh support
   137→
   138→**Post Card Layout:**
   139→- 16dp horizontal padding, 12dp vertical padding
   140→- Repost indicator (if shared): 16dp avatar + repost icon + actor name, caption size, secondary color, indented to align with post content (54dp left padding = 42dp avatar + 12dp gap)
   141→- Author row: 42dp circular avatar, 12dp gap, then name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, `textPrimary`) + timestamp (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`) on same baseline
   142→- Body text: 15sp/400, `textBody` color, 4dp below author row
   143→- Hashtags: 11sp/500, `accentMuted` color, 6dp below body
   144→- Engagement bar: 10dp below content, icons (16dp) + counts (13sp), 18dp gaps between items. Muted by default, semantic colors when active (red heart filled, green repost)
   145→
   146→**Quoted Post (if present):**
   147→- Indented block below body text
   148→- 1dp border in `divider` color, 8dp border-radius, 8dp padding
   149→- Smaller avatar (32dp), author info, truncated content
   150→
   151→**Floating Action Button:** None — compose is in the header
   152→
   153→### Post Detail Screen
   154→
   155→**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), title "Post" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`)
   156→
   157→**Post Content (expanded view):**
   158→- Same author row as timeline post card (avatar, name, handle)
   159→- Full body text rendering (no truncation), `bodyLarge`
   160→- Full timestamp below body: absolute date/time format, `labelMedium`, `textSecondary`
   161→- Visibility indicator: icon + label, `caption`, `textSecondary`
   162→
   163→**Article posts:** If post type is Article, show article title in `titleMedium` (20sp/700) above body content, with an "Article" badge (`caption`, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, capsule shape)
   164→
   165→**Engagement Stats Row:**
   166→- Horizontal row below post content, 12dp vertical padding
   167→- Counts displayed as: "12 Shares · 23 Reactions · 4 Quotes"
   168→- `bodyMedium`, counts in `textPrimary` (bold), labels in `textSecondary`
   169→- Tappable — opens bottom sheet with actor list
   170→
   171→**Action Bar:**
   172→- Below stats, separated by hairline dividers above and below
   173→- Full-width row with evenly spaced action icons: Reply, Share, React, Quote, Delete (owner only), External Share
   174→- Icons: 20dp, `textSecondary` by default, semantic colors when active
   175→- Delete icon: `reaction` red color
   176→
   177→**Reaction Groups:**
   178→- Below action bar if reactions exist
   179→- Horizontal scrollable row of emoji pills
   180→- Each pill: emoji + count, `surface` background, 16dp border-radius, 8dp horizontal padding
   181→- Active (user reacted): `accent` at 10% opacity background, `accent` text
   182→
   183→**Reaction Picker (bottom sheet):**
   184→- Modal bottom sheet, `background` color
   185→- Grid of available emoji reactions, 7 columns
   186→- Each cell: 40dp, 8dp border-radius
   187→- Active reactions highlighted with `accent` at 15% opacity background
   188→- Close button top-right
   189→
   190→**Shares/Quotes List (bottom sheet):**
   191→- Modal bottom sheet with navigation title ("Shares" or "Quotes")
   192→- List of actor rows: 40dp circular avatar, name (`bodyLargeSemiBold`), handle (`labelMedium`, `textSecondary`)
   193→- "Load more" button at bottom if paginated
   194→- Empty state: centered "No shares yet" / "No quotes yet"
   195→
   196→**Reply Thread:**
   197→- Below the main post, same post card format as timeline
   198→- Replies listed with hairline dividers
   199→- Reply FAB: 56dp circle, `accent` background, white reply icon, bottom-right positioned, 16dp margin from edges
   200→
   201→### Profile Screen
   202→
   203→**Header:** Back arrow (left) + ellipsis menu (right), no title text
   204→
   205→**Profile Section (centered):**
   206→- 80dp circular avatar
   207→- Name: 20sp/700, 12dp below avatar
   208→- Handle: 14sp/400, `textSecondary`, 2dp below name
   209→- Bio: 14sp/400, `textBody`, centered, 10dp below handle, 24dp horizontal margin
   210→- Stats row: 24dp gap between items, centered, 14dp below bio
   211→  - Each stat: count (16sp/700) above label (12sp/secondary)
   212→  - Three items: Posts, Followers, Following
   213→- Action buttons: 16dp below stats, centered
   214→  - Follow: pill button, `accent` background, white text, 28dp horizontal padding
   215→  - Share: pill button, transparent, `buttonOutline` border, share icon only
   216→- Relationship tag: "Follows you" capsule, `accentMuted` at 10% opacity background, 11sp/500, 10dp below buttons
   217→
   218→**Content:** Hairline divider, then post list identical to timeline (without avatars if showing own profile — keep avatars for consistency)
   219→
   220→### Notifications Screen
   221→
   222→**Header:** Large bold title "Notifications" (same as timeline)
   223→
   224→**Notification Rows:**
   225→- 42dp actor avatar (circular), 12dp gap
   226→- Action text: actor name (bold) + action description + timestamp
   227→- Notification type indicated by text ("liked your post", "shared your post", "followed you")
   228→- Notification type icons: all use `textSecondary` color (monochrome, consistent with design philosophy — no per-type color coding)
   229→- Hairline dividers between items
   230→- Unread indicator: red dot (8dp) on the Alerts tab icon
   231→- Empty state: centered text "No notifications yet"
   232→
   233→### Explore Screen
   234→
   235→**Header:** Large bold title "Explore"
   236→
   237→**Segmented Tabs:** Below header, "Local" / "Global" segmented control
   238→- Active tab: `accent` text, underline indicator
   239→- Inactive tab: `textSecondary`
   240→
   241→**Content:** Same post list as timeline, scoped to local or global feed
   242→
   243→### Search Screen
   244→
   245→**Header:** Large bold title "Search"
   246→
   247→**Search Bar:** Rounded text field below header, `surface` background, 12dp border-radius, search icon left-aligned, 16dp horizontal margin
   248→
   249→**Results:** Actor rows (avatar + name + handle) and post cards, depending on result type
   250→
   251→### Compose Screen
   252→
   253→**Header:** Navigation bar style
   254→- Left: "Cancel" text button (`accent` color)
   255→- Right: "Post" pill button (`accent` background, white text), disabled state at 40% opacity
   256→- Title: "Compose", "Reply", or "Quoting" centered (`bodyLargeSemiBold`, 15sp/600)
   257→
   258→**Content:**
   259→- Reply indicator (if replying): "Replying to @handle" in `textSecondary`, 13sp
   260→- Text editor: full-width, 15sp, placeholder "What's on your mind?"
   261→- Markdown support with live preview toggle
   262→
   263→**Bottom toolbar:** Visibility selector, language picker — subtle icons in `textSecondary`
   264→
   265→### Settings Screen
   266→
   267→**Header:** Large bold title "Settings"
   268→
   269→**Content:** Grouped list sections with section headers (13sp/500, uppercase, `textSecondary`)
   270→
   271→Sections:
   272→- **App Info:** Logo (80dp, 16dp corner radius), app name, version
   273→- **Typography:** Font size slider (0.75x–2.0x)
   274→- **Timeline:** Markdown truncation options
   275→- **Engagement:** Confirmation toggles
   276→- **Links:** In-app browser toggle
   277→- **About:** Open source licenses, links
   278→
   279→Each row: standard list item, 16dp padding, `textPrimary` label, `textSecondary` value/description. Hairline dividers between rows.
   280→
   281→### Sign-In Screen
   282→
   283→**Layout:** Centered vertically
   284→
   285→- Logo: 120dp, centered
   286→- Title: "Hackers' Pub" (22sp/700), 16dp below logo
   287→- Subtitle: "Sign in to continue" (14sp, `textSecondary`), 4dp below title
   288→- Username field: rounded border (12dp radius), `surface` background, 32dp below subtitle, 32dp horizontal margin
   289→- Verification code field: same style (appears after username submission)
   290→- Primary button: pill shape, `accent` background, white text, full width within margins
   291→- Error text: `error` color, 13sp, below button
   292→
   293→## Migration Strategy
   294→
   295→This redesign replaces the existing Material Design 3 theming while keeping the same Compose architecture. Changes are purely in the UI layer:
   296→
   297→1. **Theme.kt** — Replace M3 color scheme with custom color tokens
   298→2. **Spacing.kt** — Already exists, minor adjustments to values
   299→3. **New: Typography.kt** — Define custom text styles (not M3 Typography)
   300→4. **New: Shapes.kt** — Define shape tokens
   301→5. **New: Icons.kt** — Custom icon set (if switching from Material Icons to Feather/Lucide)
   302→6. **Each screen** — Replace M3 components (TopAppBar, FloatingActionButton, etc.) with custom composables
   303→7. **PostCard** — Restyle engagement bar, remove card elevation, update spacing
   304→8. **CompactTopBar** — Replace with new LargeTitle header composable
   305→
   306→No changes to ViewModels, repositories, data layer, or navigation graph. Pure visual transformation.
   307→
   308→**Note on profile stats:** The current data model (`Actor`) does not include follower/following/post counts. The stats row in the profile screen should only display stats that are available from the API. If counts are not available, omit the stats row entirely rather than showing zeros.
   309→
   310→**Note on font scaling:** The custom typography definitions serve as base values. The existing `LocalFontScale` mechanism continues to apply — all `sp` values are multiplied by the user's font scale preference (0.75x–2.0x).
   311→
   312→## Out of Scope
   313→
   314→- Custom animations/transitions (can be added later)
   315→- Custom font families (using system Roboto)
   316→- Tablet/landscape layouts
   317→- Widget design
   318→- Onboarding flow
   319→

     3→import android.app.Activity
     4→import androidx.compose.foundation.isSystemInDarkTheme
     5→import androidx.compose.material3.MaterialTheme
     6→import androidx.compose.material3.darkColorScheme
     7→import androidx.compose.material3.lightColorScheme
     8→import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
     9→import androidx.compose.runtime.SideEffect
    10→import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
    11→import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.toArgb
    12→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalView
    13→import androidx.core.view.WindowCompat
    14→
    15→private val LightColorScheme = lightColorScheme(
    16→    primary = Color(0xFF262626),
    17→    onPrimary = Color(0xFFFAFAFA),
    18→    primaryContainer = Color(0xFFF5F5F5),
    19→    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFF262626),
    20→    secondary = Color(0xFFF5F5F5),
    21→    onSecondary = Color(0xFF262626),
    22→    secondaryContainer = Color(0xFFF5F5F5),
    23→    onSecondaryContainer = Color(0xFF737373),
    24→    tertiary = Color(0xFF737373),
    25→    onTertiary = Color.White,
    26→    background = Color.White,
    27→    onBackground = Color(0xFF262626),
    28→    surface = Color.White,
    29→    onSurface = Color(0xFF262626),
    30→    surfaceVariant = Color(0xFFF5F5F5),
    31→    onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFF737373),
    32→    outline = Color(0xFFE5E5E5),
    33→    outlineVariant = Color(0xFFE5E5E5),
    34→    error = Color(0xFFDC2626),
    35→    onError = Color.White
    36→)
    37→
    38→private val DarkColorScheme = darkColorScheme(
    39→    primary = Color(0xFFFAFAFA),
    40→    onPrimary = Color(0xFF262626),
    41→    primaryContainer = Color(0xFF404040),
    42→    onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFFFAFAFA),
    43→    secondary = Color(0xFF404040),
    44→    onSecondary = Color(0xFFFAFAFA),
    45→    secondaryContainer = Color(0xFF404040),
    46→    onSecondaryContainer = Color(0xFFA3A3A3),
    47→    tertiary = Color(0xFFA3A3A3),
    48→    onTertiary = Color(0xFF262626),
    49→    background = Color(0xFF262626),
    50→    onBackground = Color(0xFFFAFAFA),
    51→    surface = Color(0xFF262626),
    52→    onSurface = Color(0xFFFAFAFA),
    53→    surfaceVariant = Color(0xFF333333),
    54→    onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFFA3A3A3),
    55→    outline = Color(0xFF404040),
    56→    outlineVariant = Color(0xFF333333),
    57→    error = Color(0xFFEF4444),
    58→    onError = Color(0xFF262626)
    59→)
    60→
    61→@Composable
    62→fun HackersPubTheme(
    63→    darkTheme: Boolean = isSystemInDarkTheme(),
    64→    content: @Composable () -> Unit
    65→) {
    66→    val colorScheme = if (darkTheme) DarkColorScheme else LightColorScheme
    67→
    68→    val view = LocalView.current
    69→    if (!view.isInEditMode) {
    70→        SideEffect {
    71→            val window = (view.context as Activity).window
    72→            window.statusBarColor = colorScheme.background.toArgb()
    73→            WindowCompat.getInsetsController(window, view).isAppearanceLightStatusBars = !darkTheme
    74→        }
    75→    }
    76→
    77→    MaterialTheme(
    78→        colorScheme = colorScheme,
    79→        content = content
    80→    )
    81→}

    96→sealed class DetailScreen(val route: String) {
    97→    data object SignIn : DetailScreen("signin?token={token}&code={code}") {
    98→        fun createRoute(token: String? = null, code: String? = null): String {
    99→            val params = mutableListOf<String>()
   100→            if (token != null) params.add("token=$token")
   101→            if (code != null) params.add("code=$code")
   102→            return if (params.isEmpty()) "signin" else "signin?${params.joinToString("&")}"
   103→        }
   104→    }
   105→    data object Compose : DetailScreen("compose?replyTo={replyTo}&quoteOf={quoteOf}") {
   106→        fun createRoute(replyTo: String? = null, quoteOf: String? = null): String {
   107→            val params = mutableListOf<String>()
   108→            if (replyTo != null) params.add("replyTo=$replyTo")
   109→            if (quoteOf != null) params.add("quoteOf=$quoteOf")
   110→            return if (params.isEmpty()) "compose" else "compose?${params.joinToString("&")}"
   111→        }
   112→    }
   113→    data object PostDetail : DetailScreen("post/{postId}") {
   114→        fun createRoute(postId: String) = "post/$postId"
   115→    }
   116→    data object Profile : DetailScreen("profile/{handle}") {
   117→        fun createRoute(handle: String) = "profile/$handle"
   118→    }
   119→}

   121→@Composable
   122→fun HackersPubApp(
   123→    deepLinkData: pub.hackers.android.DeepLinkData? = null,
   124→    viewModel: AppViewModel = hiltViewModel()
   125→) {
   126→    val navController = rememberNavController()
   127→    val isLoggedIn by viewModel.isLoggedIn.collectAsState(initial = false)
   128→
   129→    val fontSizePercent by viewModel.preferencesManager.fontSizePercent.collectAsState(initial = 100)
   130→
   131→    // Handle deep link for verification
   132→    LaunchedEffect(deepLinkData) {
   133→        deepLinkData?.let {
   134→            navController.navigate("signin?token=${it.token}&code=${it.code}")
   135→        }
   136→    }
   137→
   138→    ProvideInAppBrowserUriHandler(preferencesManager = viewModel.preferencesManager) {
   139→    CompositionLocalProvider(LocalFontScale provides (fontSizePercent / 100f)) {
   140→
   141→    val bottomNavItems = if (isLoggedIn) {
   142→        listOf(Screen.Timeline, Screen.Notifications, Screen.Explore, Screen.Search, Screen.Settings)
   143→    } else {
   144→        listOf(Screen.Explore, Screen.Search, Screen.Settings)
   145→    }
   146→
   147→    val navBackStackEntry by navController.currentBackStackEntryAsState()
   148→    val currentDestination = navBackStackEntry?.destination
   149→    val showBottomBar = bottomNavItems.any { it.route == currentDestination?.route }
   150→
   151→    Scaffold(
   152→        bottomBar = {
   153→            if (showBottomBar) {
   154→                NavigationBar(
   155→                    modifier = Modifier
   156→                        .windowInsetsPadding(WindowInsets.navigationBars)
   157→                        .height(56.dp),
   158→                    windowInsets = WindowInsets(0)
   159→                ) {
   160→                    bottomNavItems.forEach { screen ->
   161→                        val selected = currentDestination?.hierarchy?.any { it.route == screen.route } == true
   162→                        NavigationBarItem(
   163→                            icon = {
   164→                                Icon(
   165→                                    if (selected) screen.selectedIcon else screen.unselectedIcon,
   166→                                    contentDescription = stringResource(screen.titleResId)
   167→                                )
   168→                            },
   169→                            label = null,
   170→                            selected = selected,
   171→                            onClick = {
   172→                                navController.navigate(screen.route) {
   173→                                    popUpTo(navController.graph.findStartDestination().id) {
   174→                                        saveState = true
   175→                                    }
   176→                                    launchSingleTop = true
   177→                                    restoreState = true
   178→                                }
   179→                            }
   180→                        )
   181→                    }
   182→                }
   183→            }
   184→        }
   185→    ) { innerPadding ->
   186→        NavHost(
   187→            navController = navController,
   188→            startDestination = if (isLoggedIn) Screen.Timeline.route else Screen.Explore.route,
   189→            modifier = Modifier.padding(innerPadding)
   190→        ) {
   191→            composable(Screen.Timeline.route) {
   192→                TimelineScreen(
   193→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   194→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   195→                    },
   196→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   197→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   198→                    },
   199→                    onComposeClick = { replyTo ->
   200→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo))
   201→                    },
   202→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   203→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   204→                    }
   205→                )
   206→            }
   207→
   208→            composable(Screen.Notifications.route) {
   209→                NotificationsScreen(
   210→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   211→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   212→                    },
   213→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   214→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   215→                    },
   216→                    onComposeClick = {
   217→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute())
   218→                    }
   219→                )
   220→            }
   221→
   222→            composable(Screen.Explore.route) {
   223→                ExploreScreen(
   224→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   225→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   226→                    },
   227→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   228→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   229→                    },
   230→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   231→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(postId))
   232→                    },
   233→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   234→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   235→                    },
   236→                    onComposeClick = {
   237→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute())
   238→                    },
   239→                    onSignInClick = {
   240→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.SignIn.createRoute())
   241→                    },
   242→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   243→                )
   244→            }
   245→
   246→            composable(Screen.Search.route) {
   247→                SearchScreen(
   248→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   249→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   250→                    },
   251→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   252→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   253→                    },
   254→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   255→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = postId))
   256→                    },
   257→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   258→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   259→                    }
   260→                )
   261→            }
   262→
   263→            composable(Screen.Settings.route) {
   264→                SettingsScreen(
   265→                    onSignInClick = {
   266→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.SignIn.createRoute())
   267→                    },
   268→                    onSignOutComplete = {
   269→                        navController.navigate(Screen.Explore.route) {
   270→                            popUpTo(0) { inclusive = true }
   271→                        }
   272→                    },
   273→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   274→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   275→                    },
   276→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   277→                )
   278→            }
   279→
   280→            composable(
   281→                route = DetailScreen.SignIn.route,
   282→                arguments = listOf(
   283→                    navArgument("token") {
   284→                        type = NavType.StringType
   285→                        nullable = true
   286→                        defaultValue = null
   287→                    },
   288→                    navArgument("code") {
   289→                        type = NavType.StringType
   290→                        nullable = true
   291→                        defaultValue = null
   292→                    }
   293→                )
   294→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   295→                val token = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("token")
   296→                val code = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("code")
   297→                SignInScreen(
   298→                    deepLinkToken = token,
   299→                    deepLinkCode = code,
   300→                    onSignInSuccess = {
   301→                        navController.navigate(Screen.Timeline.route) {
   302→                            popUpTo(0) { inclusive = true }
   303→                        }
   304→                    },
   305→                    onNavigateBack = {
   306→                        navController.popBackStack()
   307→                    }
   308→                )
   309→            }
   310→
   311→            composable(
   312→                route = DetailScreen.Compose.route,
   313→                arguments = listOf(
   314→                    navArgument("replyTo") {
   315→                        type = NavType.StringType
   316→                        nullable = true
   317→                        defaultValue = null
   318→                    },
   319→                    navArgument("quoteOf") {
   320→                        type = NavType.StringType
   321→                        nullable = true
   322→                        defaultValue = null
   323→                    }
   324→                )
   325→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   326→                val replyTo = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("replyTo")
   327→                val quoteOf = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("quoteOf")
   328→                ComposeScreen(
   329→                    replyToId = replyTo,
   330→                    quotedPostId = quoteOf,
   331→                    onPostSuccess = {
   332→                        navController.popBackStack()
   333→                    },
   334→                    onNavigateBack = {
   335→                        navController.popBackStack()
   336→                    }
   337→                )
   338→            }
   339→
   340→            composable(
   341→                route = DetailScreen.PostDetail.route,
   342→                arguments = listOf(navArgument("postId") { type = NavType.StringType })
   343→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   344→                val postId = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("postId") ?: return@composable
   345→                PostDetailScreen(
   346→                    postId = postId,
   347→                    onNavigateBack = {
   348→                        navController.popBackStack()
   349→                    },
   350→                    onProfileClick = { handle ->
   351→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(handle))
   352→                    },
   353→                    onReplyClick = { id ->
   354→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = id))
   355→                    },
   356→                    onQuoteClick = { id ->
   357→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = id))
   358→                    },
   359→                    onPostClick = { id ->
   360→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(id))
   361→                    },
   362→                    isLoggedIn = isLoggedIn
   363→                )
   364→            }
   365→
   366→            composable(
   367→                route = DetailScreen.Profile.route,
   368→                arguments = listOf(navArgument("handle") { type = NavType.StringType })
   369→            ) { backStackEntry ->
   370→                val handle = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("handle") ?: return@composable
   371→                ProfileScreen(
   372→                    handle = handle,
   373→                    onNavigateBack = {
   374→                        navController.popBackStack()
   375→                    },
   376→                    onPostClick = { postId ->
   377→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.PostDetail.createRoute(postId))
   378→                    },
   379→                    onProfileClick = { profileHandle ->
   380→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Profile.createRoute(profileHandle))
   381→                    },
   382→                    onReplyClick = { postId ->
   383→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(replyTo = postId))
   384→                    },
   385→                    onQuoteClick = { postId ->
   386→                        navController.navigate(DetailScreen.Compose.createRoute(quoteOf = postId))
   387→                    }
   388→                )
   389→            }
   390→        }
   391→    }
   392→    } // CompositionLocalProvider
   393→    } // ProvideInAppBrowserUriHandler
   394→}

    86→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    87→@Composable
    88→fun PostDetailScreen(
    89→    postId: String,
    90→    onNavigateBack: () -> Unit,
    91→    onProfileClick: (String) -> Unit,
    92→    onReplyClick: (String) -> Unit,
    93→    onQuoteClick: (String) -> Unit = {},
    94→    onPostClick: (String) -> Unit,
    95→    isLoggedIn: Boolean = true,
    96→    viewModel: PostDetailViewModel = hiltViewModel()
    97→) {
    98→    val uiState by viewModel.uiState.collectAsState()
    99→    val context = LocalContext.current
   100→    val confirmBeforeDelete by viewModel.preferencesManager.confirmBeforeDelete.collectAsState(initial = true)
   101→    val confirmBeforeShare by viewModel.preferencesManager.confirmBeforeShare.collectAsState(initial = false)
   102→    var showDeleteConfirmation by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   103→    var showShareConfirmation by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
   104→
   105→    // Navigate back after successful deletion
   106→    LaunchedEffect(uiState.isDeleted) {
   107→        if (uiState.isDeleted) {
   108→            onNavigateBack()
   109→        }
   110→    }
   111→
   112→    // Reaction picker bottom sheet
   113→    if (uiState.showReactionPicker) {
   114→        ModalBottomSheet(
   115→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() },
   116→            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
   117→        ) {
   118→            ReactionPicker(
   119→                reactionGroups = uiState.reactionGroups,
   120→                isSubmitting = uiState.isReacting,
   121→                onEmojiSelect = { viewModel.toggleReaction(it) },
   122→                onClose = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() }
   123→            )
   124→        }
   125→    }
   126→
   127→    // Shares bottom sheet
   128→    if (uiState.showSharesSheet) {
   129→        ModalBottomSheet(
   130→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissSharesSheet() },
   131→            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
   132→        ) {
   133→            SharesSheet(
   134→                actors = uiState.shareActors,
   135→                isLoading = uiState.isLoadingShares,
   136→                onProfileClick = { handle ->
   137→                    viewModel.dismissSharesSheet()
   138→                    onProfileClick(handle)
   139→                },
   140→                onClose = { viewModel.dismissSharesSheet() }
   141→            )
   142→        }
   143→    }
   144→
   145→    // Quotes bottom sheet
   146→    if (uiState.showQuotesSheet) {
   147→        ModalBottomSheet(
   148→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet() },
   149→            sheetState = rememberModalBottomSheetState(skipPartiallyExpanded = true)
   150→        ) {
   151→            QuotesSheet(
   152→                posts = uiState.quotePosts,
   153→                isLoading = uiState.isLoadingQuotes,
   154→                onPostClick = { id ->
   155→                    viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet()
   156→                    onPostClick(id)
   157→                },
   158→                onClose = { viewModel.dismissQuotesSheet() }
   159→            )
   160→        }
   161→    }
   162→
   163→    if (showDeleteConfirmation) {
   164→        AlertDialog(
   165→            onDismissRequest = { showDeleteConfirmation = false },
   166→            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.delete_post_confirm_title)) },
   167→            text = { Text(stringResource(R.string.delete_post_confirm)) },
   168→            confirmButton = {
   169→                TextButton(
   170→                    onClick = {
   171→                        showDeleteConfirmation = false
   172→                        viewModel.deletePost()
   173→                    }
   174→                ) {
   175→                    Text(
   176→                        stringResource(R.string.delete_post),
   177→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   178→                    )
   179→                }
   180→            },
   181→            dismissButton = {
   182→                TextButton(onClick = { showDeleteConfirmation = false }) {
   183→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
   184→                }
   185→            }
   186→        )
   187→    }
   188→
   189→    if (showShareConfirmation) {
   190→        val hasShared = uiState.post?.viewerHasShared == true
   191→        AlertDialog(
   192→            onDismissRequest = { showShareConfirmation = false },
   193→            title = {
   194→                Text(stringResource(if (hasShared) R.string.unshare_confirm_title else R.string.share_confirm_title))
   195→            },
   196→            confirmButton = {
   197→                TextButton(
   198→                    onClick = {
   199→                        showShareConfirmation = false
   200→                        if (hasShared) viewModel.unsharePost() else viewModel.sharePost()
   201→                    }
   202→                ) {
   203→                    Text(stringResource(if (hasShared) R.string.unshare_confirm_action else R.string.share_confirm_action))
   204→                }
   205→            },
   206→            dismissButton = {
   207→                TextButton(onClick = { showShareConfirmation = false }) {
   208→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.cancel))
   209→                }
   210→            }
   211→        )
   212→    }
   213→
   214→    if (uiState.deleteError != null) {
   215→        AlertDialog(
   216→            onDismissRequest = { viewModel.dismissDeleteError() },
   217→            title = { Text(stringResource(R.string.action_error)) },
   218→            text = { Text(uiState.deleteError ?: "") },
   219→            confirmButton = {
   220→                TextButton(onClick = { viewModel.dismissDeleteError() }) {
   221→                    Text(stringResource(R.string.ok))
   222→                }
   223→            }
   224→        )
   225→    }
   226→
   227→    Scaffold(
   228→        contentWindowInsets = WindowInsets(0),
   229→        topBar = {
   230→            CompactTopBar(
   231→                title = if (uiState.post?.typename == "Article") "Article" else "Post",
   232→                navigationIcon = {
   233→                    IconButton(onClick = onNavigateBack) {
   234→                        Icon(
   235→                            imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.ArrowBack,
   236→                            contentDescription = "Back"
   237→                        )
   238→                    }
   239→                },
   240→                actions = {
   241→                    if (uiState.canDelete) {
   242→                        PostDetailActionMenu(
   243→                            isDeleting = uiState.isDeleting,
   244→                            onDelete = {
   245→                                if (confirmBeforeDelete) {
   246→                                    showDeleteConfirmation = true
   247→                                } else {
   248→                                    viewModel.deletePost()
   249→                                }
   250→                            }
   251→                        )
   252→                    }
   253→                }
   254→            )
   255→        },
   256→        floatingActionButton = {
   257→            if (uiState.post != null && isLoggedIn) {
   258→                FloatingActionButton(
   259→                    onClick = { onReplyClick(postId) }
   260→                ) {
   261→                    Icon(
   262→                        imageVector = Icons.AutoMirrored.Filled.Reply,
   263→                        contentDescription = stringResource(R.string.reply)
   264→                    )
   265→                }
   266→            }
   267→        }
   268→    ) { paddingValues ->
   269→        Box(
   270→            modifier = Modifier
   271→                .fillMaxSize()
   272→                .padding(paddingValues)
   273→        ) {
   274→            when {
   275→                uiState.isLoading -> {
   276→                    FullScreenLoading()
   277→                }
   278→                uiState.error != null -> {
   279→                    ErrorMessage(
   280→                        message = uiState.error ?: stringResource(R.string.error_generic),
   281→                        onRetry = { viewModel.loadPost(postId) }
   282→                    )
   283→                }
   284→                uiState.post != null -> {
   285→                    PullToRefreshBox(
   286→                        isRefreshing = uiState.isRefreshing,
   287→                        onRefresh = { viewModel.refresh() }
   288→                    ) {
   289→                        PostDetailContent(
   290→                            post = uiState.post!!,
   291→                            reactionGroups = uiState.reactionGroups,
   292→                            replies = uiState.replies,
   293→                            hasMoreReplies = uiState.hasMoreReplies,
   294→                            isLoadingMoreReplies = uiState.isLoadingMoreReplies,
   295→                            onLoadMoreReplies = { viewModel.loadMoreReplies() },
   296→                            onProfileClick = onProfileClick,
   297→                            onPostClick = onPostClick,
   298→                            onReplyClick = { onReplyClick(postId) },
   299→                            onShareClick = {
   300→                                if (confirmBeforeShare) {
   301→                                    showShareConfirmation = true
   302→                                } else {
   303→                                    if (uiState.post!!.viewerHasShared) {
   304→                                        viewModel.unsharePost()
   305→                                    } else {
   306→                                        viewModel.sharePost()
   307→                                    }
   308→                                }
   309→                            },
   310→                            onReactionClick = { emoji -> viewModel.toggleReaction(emoji) },
   311→                            onReactionPickerClick = { viewModel.toggleReactionPicker() },
   312→                            onQuoteClick = { onQuoteClick(postId) },
   313→                            onSharesClick = { viewModel.showSharesSheet() },
   314→                            onQuotesClick = { viewModel.showQuotesSheet() },
   315→                            onExternalShareClick = {
   316→                                val shareUrl = uiState.post?.url
   317→                                    ?: uiState.post?.iri
   318→                                if (shareUrl != null) {
   319→                                    val sendIntent = Intent().apply {
   320→                                        action = Intent.ACTION_SEND
   321→                                        putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_TEXT, shareUrl)
   322→                                        type = "text/plain"
   323→                                    }
   324→                                    context.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(sendIntent, null))
   325→                                }
   326→                            }
   327→                        )
   328→                    }
   329→                }
   330→            }
   331→        }
   332→    }
   333→}
